Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**************************************************************************************************

  Exponential objects

  The exponential object b^a is defined via a left adjoint to the functor a × _. Since this functor
  is not definitionally equal to _ × a, we have to show that having a left adjoint to one of these
  functors also gives a left adjoint to the other. Furthermore, we give accessors for all aspects of
  both of these adjunctions, define what it means for a functor to preserve exponentials, and show
  that exponentials can be transported along an adjoint equivalence.

  Anders Mörtberg, 2016
  Section [ExponentialsCarriedThroughAdjointEquivalence] added by Ralph Matthes in 2023

  Contents:
  1. Definition of exponentials [Exponentials]
  2. Accessors [exp] [exp_eval(_alt)] [exp_lam] [exp_app] [exp_beta] [exp_eta]
  3. Preservation [preserves_exponentials]
  4. Transport along an adjoint equivalence
    [is_expDd0_adjunction_laws] [exponentials_through_adj_equivalence_univalent_cats]
  5. Exponentials are independent of the choice of the binary products
  6. Preservation of is_exponentiable under isomorphisms
  7. Exponents
  8. Properties Of Exponents
  9. Preservation (characterizations)
  10. Reflection

 **************************************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Coreflections.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.

(* for Section [ExponentialsCarriedThroughAdjointEquivalence] *)
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Preservation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.catiso.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.CategoryEquality.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.

Local Open Scope cat.


(** * 1. Definition of exponentials *)
Section Exponentials.

  Context {C : category} (PC : BinProducts C).

  (* The functor "a × _" and "_ × a" *)
  Definition constprod_functor1 (a : C) : functor C C :=
    BinProduct_of_functors C C PC (constant_functor C C a) (functor_identity C).

  Definition constprod_functor2 (a : C) : functor C C :=
    BinProduct_of_functors C C PC (functor_identity C) (constant_functor C C a).

  Definition is_exponentiable (a : C) : UU := is_left_adjoint (constprod_functor1 a).

  Definition Exponentials : UU := ∏ (a : C), is_exponentiable a.
  Definition hasExponentials : UU := ∏ (a : C), ∥ is_exponentiable a ∥.

  Definition flip_z_iso a : @z_iso [C,C] (constprod_functor1 a) (constprod_functor2 a)
    := z_iso_from_nat_z_iso _
      (BinProduct_of_functors_commutes C C PC (constant_functor C C a) (functor_identity C)).

  Definition is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable'
    (a : C)
    (HF : is_exponentiable a)
    : is_left_adjoint (constprod_functor2 a)
    := is_left_adjoint_closed_under_iso _ _ (flip_z_iso a) HF.

  Definition is_exponentiable'_to_is_exponentiable
    (a : C)
    (HF : is_left_adjoint (constprod_functor2 a))
    : is_exponentiable a
    := is_left_adjoint_closed_under_iso _ _ (z_iso_inv (flip_z_iso a)) HF.

End Exponentials.

(** * 2. Accessors *)
Section Accessors.

  Context {C : category}
          {prodC : BinProducts C}
          {x : C}
          (exp_x : is_exponentiable prodC x).

  Let exp_x_alt
    : is_left_adjoint (constprod_functor2 _ x)
    := is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' _ _ exp_x.

  Definition exp (y : C)
    : C
    := pr1 exp_x y.

  Definition exp_mor {y y' : C} (f : C⟦y, y'⟧)
    : C⟦exp y, exp y'⟧
    := #(pr1 exp_x) f.

  Definition exp_eval (y : C)
    : prodC x (exp y) --> y
    := counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x) y.

  Definition exp_eval_alt (y : C)
    : prodC (exp y) x --> y
    := counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x_alt) y.

  Definition exp_lam
             {y z : C}
             (f : prodC x y --> z)
    : y --> exp z
    := φ_adj (pr2 exp_x) f.

  Definition exp_lam_alt
             {y z : C}
             (f : prodC y x --> z)
    : y --> exp z
    := φ_adj (pr2 exp_x_alt) f.

  Definition exp_app
             {y z : C}
             (f : y --> exp z)
    : prodC x y --> z
    := φ_adj_inv (pr2 exp_x) f.

  Definition exp_app_alt
             {y z : C}
             (f : y --> exp z)
    : prodC y x --> z
    := φ_adj_inv (pr2 exp_x_alt) f.

  Definition exp_lam_app
             {y z : C}
             (f : y --> exp z)
    : exp_lam (exp_app f) = f
    := φ_adj_after_φ_adj_inv _ _.

  Definition exp_lam_app_alt
             {y z : C}
             (f : y --> exp z)
    : exp_lam_alt (exp_app_alt f) = f
    := φ_adj_after_φ_adj_inv _ _.

  Definition exp_app_lam
             {y z : C}
             (f : prodC x y --> z)
    : exp_app (exp_lam f) = f
    := φ_adj_inv_after_φ_adj (pr2 exp_x) _.

  Definition exp_app_lam_alt
             {y z : C}
             (f : prodC y x --> z)
    : exp_app_alt (exp_lam_alt f) = f
    := φ_adj_inv_after_φ_adj (pr2 exp_x_alt) _.

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ prodC x y, z ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x (exp z)) (prodC x y)
  (identity x) (exp_lam f) · exp_eval z = f

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ prodC x y, z ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x (exp z)) (prodC x y)
  (identity x) (exp_lam f) · exp_eval z = f

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ prodC x y, z ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C
  (prodC x
     ((constprod_functor1 prodC x ∙ pr1 exp_x) y))
  (prodC x y) (identity x)
  (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x) y)
· BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x (exp z))
    (prodC x
       ((constprod_functor1 prodC x ∙ pr1 exp_x) y))
    (identity x) (# (pr1 exp_x) f) · exp_eval z = f

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ prodC x y, z ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C
  (prodC x
     ((constprod_functor1 prodC x ∙ pr1 exp_x) y))
  (prodC x y) (identity x)
  (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x) y)
· (BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x (exp z))
     (prodC x
        ((constprod_functor1 prodC x ∙ pr1 exp_x) y))
     (identity x) (# (pr1 exp_x) f) · exp_eval z) = f

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ prodC x y, z ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C
  (prodC x
     ((constprod_functor1 prodC x ∙ pr1 exp_x) y))
  (prodC x y) (identity x)
  (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x) y)
· (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x) (prodC x y)
   · # (functor_identity C) f) = f

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ prodC x y, z ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C
  (prodC x
     ((constprod_functor1 prodC x ∙ pr1 exp_x) y))
  (prodC x y) (identity x)
  (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x) y)
· counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x) (prodC x y)
· # (functor_identity C) f = f

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ prodC x y, z ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C
  (prodC x
     ((constprod_functor1 prodC x ∙ pr1 exp_x) y))
  (prodC x y) (identity x)
  (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x) y)
· counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x) (prodC x y)
· # (functor_identity C) f = identity (prodC x y) · f

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ prodC x y, z ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C
  (prodC x
     ((constprod_functor1 prodC x ∙ pr1 exp_x) y))
  (prodC x y) (identity x)
  (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x) y)
· counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x) (prodC x y) =
identity (prodC x y)

    apply (triangle_id_left_ad (pr2 exp_x)).
  Qed.

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ prodC y x, z ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC (exp z) x) (prodC y x)
  (exp_lam_alt f) (identity x) · exp_eval_alt z = f

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ prodC y x, z ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC (exp z) x) (prodC y x)
  (exp_lam_alt f) (identity x) · exp_eval_alt z = f

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ prodC y x, z ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C
  (prodC
     ((constprod_functor2 prodC x ∙ pr1 exp_x_alt) y)
     x) (prodC y x)
  (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x_alt) y)
  (identity x)
· BinProductOfArrows C (prodC (exp z) x)
    (prodC
       ((constprod_functor2 prodC x ∙ pr1 exp_x_alt) y)
       x) (# (pr1 exp_x_alt) f) (identity x)
· exp_eval_alt z = f

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ prodC y x, z ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C
  (prodC
     ((constprod_functor2 prodC x ∙ pr1 exp_x_alt) y)
     x) (prodC y x)
  (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x_alt) y)
  (identity x)
· (BinProductOfArrows C (prodC (exp z) x)
     (prodC
        ((constprod_functor2 prodC x ∙ pr1 exp_x_alt)
           y) x) (# (pr1 exp_x_alt) f) (identity x)
   · exp_eval_alt z) = f

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ prodC y x, z ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C
  (prodC
     ((constprod_functor2 prodC x ∙ pr1 exp_x_alt) y)
     x) (prodC y x)
  (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x_alt) y)
  (identity x)
· (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x_alt)
     (prodC y x) · # (functor_identity C) f) = f

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ prodC y x, z ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C
  (prodC
     ((constprod_functor2 prodC x ∙ pr1 exp_x_alt) y)
     x) (prodC y x)
  (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x_alt) y)
  (identity x)
· counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x_alt) (prodC y x)
· # (functor_identity C) f = f

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ prodC y x, z ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C
  (prodC
     ((constprod_functor2 prodC x ∙ pr1 exp_x_alt) y)
     x) (prodC y x)
  (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x_alt) y)
  (identity x)
· counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x_alt) (prodC y x)
· # (functor_identity C) f = identity (prodC y x) · f

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ prodC y x, z ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C
  (prodC
     ((constprod_functor2 prodC x ∙ pr1 exp_x_alt) y)
     x) (prodC y x)
  (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x_alt) y)
  (identity x)
· counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x_alt) (prodC y x) =
identity (prodC y x)

    apply (triangle_id_left_ad (pr2 exp_x_alt)).
  Qed.

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧
f =
exp_lam
  (BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x (exp z)) (prodC x y)
     (identity x) f · exp_eval z)

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧
f =
exp_lam
  (BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x (exp z)) (prodC x y)
     (identity x) f · exp_eval z)

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧
f =
unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x) y
· (# (pr1 exp_x)
     (BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x (exp z))
        (prodC x y) (identity x) f)
   · # (pr1 exp_x) (exp_eval z))

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧
f =
unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x) y
· # (pr1 exp_x)
    (BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x (exp z))
       (prodC x y) (identity x) f)
· # (pr1 exp_x) (exp_eval z)

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧
# (functor_identity C) f
· unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x) (exp z)
· # (pr1 exp_x) (exp_eval z) = f

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧
# (functor_identity C) f
· unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x) (exp z)
· # (pr1 exp_x) (exp_eval z) =
f · identity (pr1 exp_x z)

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧
# (functor_identity C) f
· (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x) (exp z)
   · # (pr1 exp_x) (exp_eval z)) =
f · identity (pr1 exp_x z)

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧
unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x) (exp z)
· # (pr1 exp_x) (exp_eval z) = identity (pr1 exp_x z)

    exact (triangle_id_right_ad (pr2 exp_x) _).
  Qed.

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧
f =
exp_lam_alt
  (BinProductOfArrows C (prodC (exp z) x) (prodC y x)
     f (identity x) · exp_eval_alt z)

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧
f =
exp_lam_alt
  (BinProductOfArrows C (prodC (exp z) x) (prodC y x)
     f (identity x) · exp_eval_alt z)

prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧
f =
unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x_alt) y
· (# (pr1 exp_x)
     (BinProductOfArrows C (prodC (exp z) x)
        (prodC y x) f (identity x))
   · # (pr1 exp_x) (exp_eval_alt z))

  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint

f: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧

unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x_alt) y
· # (pr1 exp_x)
    (BinProductOfArrows C (prodC (exp z) x)
       (prodC y x) f (identity x))
· # (pr1 exp_x) (exp_eval_alt z)

exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧
# (functor_identity C) f
· unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x_alt) (exp z)
· # (pr1 exp_x) (exp_eval_alt z) = f

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧
# (functor_identity C) f
· unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x_alt) (exp z)
· # (pr1 exp_x) (exp_eval_alt z) =
f · identity (pr1 exp_x z)

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧
# (functor_identity C) f
· (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x_alt) (exp z)
   · # (pr1 exp_x) (exp_eval_alt z)) =
f · identity (pr1 exp_x z)

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧
unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x_alt) (exp z)
· # (pr1 exp_x) (exp_eval_alt z) =
identity (pr1 exp_x z)

    exact (triangle_id_right_ad (pr2 exp_x_alt) _).
  Qed.

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧
p: ∏ (a : C) (h : C ⟦ a, x ⟧),
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x (exp z)) 
  (prodC a y) h f · exp_eval z =
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x (exp z)) 
  (prodC a y) h g · exp_eval z
f = g

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧
p: ∏ (a : C) (h : C ⟦ a, x ⟧),
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x (exp z)) 
  (prodC a y) h f · exp_eval z =
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x (exp z)) 
  (prodC a y) h g · exp_eval z
f = g

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧
p: ∏ (a : C) (h : C ⟦ a, x ⟧),
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x (exp z)) 
  (prodC a y) h f · exp_eval z =
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x (exp z)) 
  (prodC a y) h g · exp_eval z
exp_lam
  (BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x (exp z)) (prodC x y)
     (identity x) f · exp_eval z) =
exp_lam
  (BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x (exp z)) (prodC x y)
     (identity x) g · exp_eval z)

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧
p: ∏ (a : C) (h : C ⟦ a, x ⟧),
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x (exp z)) 
  (prodC a y) h f · exp_eval z =
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x (exp z)) 
  (prodC a y) h g · exp_eval z
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x (exp z)) (prodC x y)
  (identity x) f · exp_eval z =
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x (exp z)) (prodC x y)
  (identity x) g · exp_eval z

    apply p.
  Qed.

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧
p: ∏ (a : C) (h : C ⟦ a, x ⟧),
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC (exp z) x) 
  (prodC y a) f h · exp_eval_alt z =
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC (exp z) x) 
  (prodC y a) g h · exp_eval_alt z
f = g

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧
p: ∏ (a : C) (h : C ⟦ a, x ⟧),
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC (exp z) x) 
  (prodC y a) f h · exp_eval_alt z =
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC (exp z) x) 
  (prodC y a) g h · exp_eval_alt z
f = g

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧
p: ∏ (a : C) (h : C ⟦ a, x ⟧),
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC (exp z) x) 
  (prodC y a) f h · exp_eval_alt z =
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC (exp z) x) 
  (prodC y a) g h · exp_eval_alt z
exp_lam_alt
  (BinProductOfArrows C (prodC (exp z) x) (prodC y x)
     f (identity x) · exp_eval_alt z) =
exp_lam_alt
  (BinProductOfArrows C (prodC (exp z) x) (prodC y x)
     g (identity x) · exp_eval_alt z)

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_x_alt:= is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' prodC
  x exp_x: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ y, exp z ⟧
p: ∏ (a : C) (h : C ⟦ a, x ⟧),
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC (exp z) x) 
  (prodC y a) f h · exp_eval_alt z =
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC (exp z) x) 
  (prodC y a) g h · exp_eval_alt z
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC (exp z) x) (prodC y x) f
  (identity x) · exp_eval_alt z =
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC (exp z) x) (prodC y x) g
  (identity x) · exp_eval_alt z

    apply p.
  Qed.

  Definition exp_lam_natural
              {w y z : C}
              (f : prodC x y --> z)
              (s : w --> y)
    : s · exp_lam f
      =
      exp_lam (BinProductOfArrows _ _ _ (identity _ ) s · f)
    := !φ_adj_natural_precomp _ _ _ _ _ _.

  Definition exp_lam_natural_alt
              {w y z : C}
              (f : prodC y x --> z)
              (s : w --> y)
    : s · exp_lam_alt f
      =
      exp_lam_alt (BinProductOfArrows _ _ _ s (identity _ ) · f)
    := !φ_adj_natural_precomp _ _ _ _ _ _.

End Accessors.

Section DoubleConversion.

  Context {C : category}
          {prodC : BinProducts C}
          {x : C}
          (exp_x_alt : is_left_adjoint (constprod_functor2 prodC x)).

  Let exp_x_alt_alt
    : is_exponentiable prodC x
    := is_exponentiable'_to_is_exponentiable _ _ exp_x_alt.

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x_alt: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
exp_x_alt_alt:= is_exponentiable'_to_is_exponentiable
  prodC x exp_x_alt: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_eval_alt exp_x_alt_alt =
counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x_alt)

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x_alt: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
exp_x_alt_alt:= is_exponentiable'_to_is_exponentiable
  prodC x exp_x_alt: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_eval_alt exp_x_alt_alt =
counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x_alt)

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x_alt: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
exp_x_alt_alt:= is_exponentiable'_to_is_exponentiable
  prodC x exp_x_alt: is_exponentiable prodC x
exp_eval_alt exp_x_alt_alt ~
counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x_alt)

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x_alt: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
exp_x_alt_alt:= is_exponentiable'_to_is_exponentiable
  prodC x exp_x_alt: is_exponentiable prodC x
y: C
exp_eval_alt exp_x_alt_alt y =
counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x_alt) y

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x_alt: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
exp_x_alt_alt:= is_exponentiable'_to_is_exponentiable
  prodC x exp_x_alt: is_exponentiable prodC x
y: C
pre_whisker (pr1 exp_x_alt_alt)
  (inv_from_z_iso (flip_z_iso prodC x)) y
· pre_whisker (pr1 exp_x_alt)
    (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_inv (flip_z_iso prodC x)))
    y · (pr212 exp_x_alt) y =
counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x_alt) y

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x_alt: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
exp_x_alt_alt:= is_exponentiable'_to_is_exponentiable
  prodC x exp_x_alt: is_exponentiable prodC x
y: C
identity
  (BinProduct_of_functors C C prodC
     (functor_identity C) (constant_functor C C x)
     (pr1 (pr1 exp_x_alt_alt) y))
· (pr212 exp_x_alt) y =
counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 exp_x_alt) y

    apply id_left.
  Qed.

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x_alt: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
exp_x_alt_alt:= is_exponentiable'_to_is_exponentiable
  prodC x exp_x_alt: is_exponentiable prodC x
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ prodC y x, z ⟧
exp_lam_alt exp_x_alt_alt f = φ_adj (pr2 exp_x_alt) f

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x_alt: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
exp_x_alt_alt:= is_exponentiable'_to_is_exponentiable
  prodC x exp_x_alt: is_exponentiable prodC x
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ prodC y x, z ⟧
exp_lam_alt exp_x_alt_alt f = φ_adj (pr2 exp_x_alt) f

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x_alt: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
exp_x_alt_alt:= is_exponentiable'_to_is_exponentiable
  prodC x exp_x_alt: is_exponentiable prodC x
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ prodC y x, z ⟧
φ_adj (pr2 exp_x_alt)
  (z_iso_inv (flip_z_iso prodC x) y
   · (flip_z_iso prodC x y · f)) =
φ_adj (pr2 exp_x_alt) f

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x_alt: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
exp_x_alt_alt:= is_exponentiable'_to_is_exponentiable
  prodC x exp_x_alt: is_exponentiable prodC x
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ prodC y x, z ⟧
z_iso_inv (flip_z_iso prodC x) y
· (flip_z_iso prodC x y · f) = f

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x_alt: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
exp_x_alt_alt:= is_exponentiable'_to_is_exponentiable
  prodC x exp_x_alt: is_exponentiable prodC x
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ prodC y x, z ⟧
z_iso_inv (flip_z_iso prodC x) y
· flip_z_iso prodC x y · f = f

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x_alt: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
exp_x_alt_alt:= is_exponentiable'_to_is_exponentiable
  prodC x exp_x_alt: is_exponentiable prodC x
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ prodC y x, z ⟧
identity
  (BinProduct_of_functors C C prodC
     (functor_identity C) (constant_functor C C x) y)
· f = f

    apply id_left.
  Qed.

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x_alt: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
exp_x_alt_alt:= is_exponentiable'_to_is_exponentiable
  prodC x exp_x_alt: is_exponentiable prodC x
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, exp exp_x_alt_alt z ⟧
exp_app_alt exp_x_alt_alt f =
φ_adj_inv (pr2 exp_x_alt) f

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x_alt: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
exp_x_alt_alt:= is_exponentiable'_to_is_exponentiable
  prodC x exp_x_alt: is_exponentiable prodC x
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, exp exp_x_alt_alt z ⟧
exp_app_alt exp_x_alt_alt f =
φ_adj_inv (pr2 exp_x_alt) f

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x_alt: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
exp_x_alt_alt:= is_exponentiable'_to_is_exponentiable
  prodC x exp_x_alt: is_exponentiable prodC x
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, exp exp_x_alt_alt z ⟧
z_iso_inv (flip_z_iso prodC x) y
· φ_adj_inv
    (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso
       (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
       (constprod_functor1 prodC x) (pr1 exp_x_alt)
       (z_iso_inv (flip_z_iso prodC x))
       (pr2 exp_x_alt)) f =
φ_adj_inv (pr2 exp_x_alt) f

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x_alt: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
exp_x_alt_alt:= is_exponentiable'_to_is_exponentiable
  prodC x exp_x_alt: is_exponentiable prodC x
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, exp exp_x_alt_alt z ⟧
z_iso_inv (flip_z_iso prodC x) y
· (z_iso_inv (z_iso_inv (flip_z_iso prodC x)) y
   · φ_adj_inv (pr2 exp_x_alt) f) =
φ_adj_inv (pr2 exp_x_alt) f

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x_alt: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
exp_x_alt_alt:= is_exponentiable'_to_is_exponentiable
  prodC x exp_x_alt: is_exponentiable prodC x
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, exp exp_x_alt_alt z ⟧
z_iso_inv (flip_z_iso prodC x) y
· z_iso_inv (z_iso_inv (flip_z_iso prodC x)) y
· φ_adj_inv (pr2 exp_x_alt) f =
φ_adj_inv (pr2 exp_x_alt) f

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x: C
exp_x_alt: is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 prodC x)
exp_x_alt_alt:= is_exponentiable'_to_is_exponentiable
  prodC x exp_x_alt: is_exponentiable prodC x
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, exp exp_x_alt_alt z ⟧
identity
  (BinProduct_of_functors C C prodC
     (functor_identity C) (constant_functor C C x) y)
· φ_adj_inv (pr2 exp_x_alt) f =
φ_adj_inv (pr2 exp_x_alt) f

    apply id_left.
  Qed.

End DoubleConversion.

(** * 3. Preservation *)
Section Preservation.

  (** * Preservation of exponentials by functors *)
  
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x, y: C₁
C₂ ⟦ F (exp (E₁ x) y), exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y) ⟧

  
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x, y: C₁
C₂ ⟦ F (exp (E₁ x) y), exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y) ⟧

    
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x, y: C₁
C₂ ⟦ BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)), F y ⟧

    
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x, y: C₁
f:= preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F HF
  (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y))
  (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))): z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
     (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
  (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))
C₂ ⟦ BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)), F y ⟧

    
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x, y: C₁
f:= preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F HF
  (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y))
  (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))): z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
     (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
  (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))
C₁ ⟦ pr11 (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)), y ⟧

    apply exp_eval.
  Defined.

  Definition preserves_exponentials
            {C₁ C₂ : category}
            {BC₁ : BinProducts C₁}
            {BC₂ : BinProducts C₂}
            (E₁ : Exponentials BC₁)
            (E₂ : Exponentials BC₂)
            {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
            (HF : preserves_binproduct F)
    : UU
    := ∏ (x y : C₁), is_z_isomorphism (preserves_exponentials_map E₁ E₂ HF x y).

End Preservation.


C: category
BC: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC
x, y: C
identity (functor_identity C (exp (E x) y)) =
preserves_exponentials_map E E
  (identity_preserves_binproduct C) x y


C: category
BC: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC
x, y: C
identity (functor_identity C (exp (E x) y)) =
preserves_exponentials_map E E
  (identity_preserves_binproduct C) x y

  
C: category
BC: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC
x, y: C
identity (functor_identity C (exp (E x) y)) =
exp_lam (E (functor_identity C x))
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
        (functor_identity C)
        (identity_preserves_binproduct C)
        (BC x (exp (E x) y))
        (BC (functor_identity C x)
           (functor_identity C (exp (E x) y))))
   · # (functor_identity C) (exp_eval (E x) y))

  
C: category
BC: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC
x, y: C
identity (exp (E x) y) =
exp_lam (E x)
  (BinProductArrow C
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct
        (functor_identity C)
        (identity_preserves_binproduct C)
        (BC x (exp (E x) y)))
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC x (exp (E x) y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC x (exp (E x) y)))
   · exp_eval (E x) y)

  
C: category
BC: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC
x, y: C
exp_lam (E x)
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC x (exp (E x) y)) (identity x)
     (identity (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y) =
exp_lam (E x)
  (BinProductArrow C
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct
        (functor_identity C)
        (identity_preserves_binproduct C)
        (BC x (exp (E x) y)))
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC x (exp (E x) y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC x (exp (E x) y)))
   · exp_eval (E x) y)

  
C: category
BC: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC
x, y: C
BinProductOfArrows C (BC x (exp (E x) y))
  (BC x (exp (E x) y)) (identity x)
  (identity (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y =
BinProductArrow C
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct
     (functor_identity C)
     (identity_preserves_binproduct C)
     (BC x (exp (E x) y)))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC x (exp (E x) y)))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC x (exp (E x) y)))
· exp_eval (E x) y

  
C: category
BC: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC
x, y: C
BinProductOfArrows C (BC x (exp (E x) y))
  (BC x (exp (E x) y)) (identity x)
  (identity (exp (E x) y)) =
BinProductArrow C
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct
     (functor_identity C)
     (identity_preserves_binproduct C)
     (BC x (exp (E x) y)))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC x (exp (E x) y)))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC x (exp (E x) y)))

  
C: category
BC: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC
x, y: C
BinProductArrow C (BC x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC x (exp (E x) y)) · identity x)
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC x (exp (E x) y))
   · identity (exp (E x) y)) =
BinProductArrow C
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct
     (functor_identity C)
     (identity_preserves_binproduct C)
     (BC x (exp (E x) y)))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC x (exp (E x) y)))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC x (exp (E x) y)))

  
C: category
BC: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC
x, y: C
BinProductArrow C (BC x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC x (exp (E x) y)))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC x (exp (E x) y))) =
BinProductArrow C
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct
     (functor_identity C)
     (identity_preserves_binproduct C)
     (BC x (exp (E x) y)))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC x (exp (E x) y)))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC x (exp (E x) y)))

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C: category
BC: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC
preserves_exponentials E E
  (identity_preserves_binproduct C)


C: category
BC: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC
preserves_exponentials E E
  (identity_preserves_binproduct C)

  
C: category
BC: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC
x, y: C
is_z_isomorphism
  (preserves_exponentials_map E E
     (identity_preserves_binproduct C) x y)

  
C: category
BC: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC
x, y: C
C ⟦ functor_identity C (exp (E x) y),
exp (E (functor_identity C x)) (functor_identity C y)
⟧
C: category
BC: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC
x, y: C
?f =
preserves_exponentials_map E E
  (identity_preserves_binproduct C) x y
C: category
BC: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC
x, y: C
is_z_isomorphism ?f

  
C: category
BC: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC
x, y: C
C ⟦ functor_identity C (exp (E x) y),
exp (E (functor_identity C x)) (functor_identity C y)
⟧
 apply identity.
  
C: category
BC: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC
x, y: C
identity
  (exp (E (functor_identity C x))
     (functor_identity C y)) =
preserves_exponentials_map E E
  (identity_preserves_binproduct C) x y
 apply preserves_exponentials_map_id.
  
C: category
BC: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC
x, y: C
is_z_isomorphism
  (identity
     (exp (E (functor_identity C x))
        (functor_identity C y)))
 apply identity_is_z_iso.
Defined.

Section CompPreserves.
  Context {C₁ C₂ C₃ : category}
          {BC₁ : BinProducts C₁}
          {BC₂ : BinProducts C₂}
          {BC₃ : BinProducts C₃}
          {E₁ : Exponentials BC₁}
          {E₂ : Exponentials BC₂}
          {E₃ : Exponentials BC₃}
          {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
          {HF : preserves_binproduct F}
          (HFE : preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF)
          {G : C₂ ⟶ C₃}
          {HG : preserves_binproduct G}
          (HGE : preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG).

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
# G (preserves_exponentials_map E₁ E₂ HF x y)
· preserves_exponentials_map E₂ E₃ HG (F x) (F y) =
preserves_exponentials_map E₁ E₃
  (composition_preserves_binproduct HF HG) x y

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
# G (preserves_exponentials_map E₁ E₂ HF x y)
· preserves_exponentials_map E₂ E₃ HG (F x) (F y) =
preserves_exponentials_map E₁ E₃
  (composition_preserves_binproduct HF HG) x y

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
# G
  (exp_lam (E₂ (F x))
     (BinProductArrow C₂
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
           (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
        (BinProductPr1 C₂
           (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
        (BinProductPr2 C₂
           (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
      · # F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y)))
· exp_lam (E₃ (G (F x)))
    (BinProductArrow C₃
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G HG
          (BC₂ (F x) (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
       (BinProductPr1 C₃
          (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))))
       (BinProductPr2 C₃
          (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))))
     · # G (exp_eval (E₂ (F x)) (F y))) =
exp_lam (E₃ (G (F x)))
  (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct (F ∙ G)
        (composition_preserves_binproduct HF HG)
        (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃
        (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃
        (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
   · # G (# F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y)))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
exp_lam (E₃ (G (F x)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₃
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (exp (E₃ (G (F x))) (G (F y))))
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
     (identity (G (F x)))
     (# G
        (exp_lam (E₂ (F x))
           (BinProductArrow C₂
              (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
                 (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
              (BinProductPr1 C₂
                 (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
              (BinProductPr2 C₂
                 (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
            · # F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y)))
      · exp_lam (E₃ (G (F x)))
          (BinProductArrow C₃
             (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G HG
                (BC₂ (F x) (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
             (BinProductPr1 C₃
                (BC₃ (G (F x))
                   (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))))
             (BinProductPr2 C₃
                (BC₃ (G (F x))
                   (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))))
           · # G (exp_eval (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
   · exp_eval (E₃ (G (F x))) (G (F y))) =
exp_lam (E₃ (G (F x)))
  (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct (F ∙ G)
        (composition_preserves_binproduct HF HG)
        (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃
        (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃
        (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
   · # G (# F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y)))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
BinProductOfArrows C₃
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (exp (E₃ (G (F x))) (G (F y))))
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
  (identity (G (F x)))
  (# G
     (exp_lam (E₂ (F x))
        (BinProductArrow C₂
           (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
              (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
           (BinProductPr1 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
           (BinProductPr2 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
         · # F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y)))
   · exp_lam (E₃ (G (F x)))
       (BinProductArrow C₃
          (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G HG
             (BC₂ (F x) (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
          (BinProductPr1 C₃
             (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))))
          (BinProductPr2 C₃
             (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))))
        · # G (exp_eval (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
· exp_eval (E₃ (G (F x))) (G (F y)) =
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct (F ∙ G)
     (composition_preserves_binproduct HF HG)
     (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
· # G (# F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
BinProductOfArrows C₃
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (exp (E₃ (G (F x))) (G (F y))))
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
  (identity (G (F x)))
  (# G
     (exp_lam (E₂ (F x))
        (BinProductArrow C₂
           (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
              (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
           (BinProductPr1 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
           (BinProductPr2 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
         · # F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y)))
   · exp_lam (E₃ (G (F x)))
       (BinProductArrow C₃
          (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G HG
             (BC₂ (F x) (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
          (BinProductPr1 C₃
             (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))))
          (BinProductPr2 C₃
             (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))))
        · # G (exp_eval (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
· exp_eval (E₃ (G (F x))) (G (F y)) = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
?b =
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct (F ∙ G)
     (composition_preserves_binproduct HF HG)
     (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
· # G (# F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
BinProductOfArrows C₃
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (exp (E₃ (G (F x))) (G (F y))))
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
  (identity (G (F x)))
  (# G
     (exp_lam (E₂ (F x))
        (BinProductArrow C₂
           (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
              (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
           (BinProductPr1 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
           (BinProductPr2 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
         · # F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y)))
   · exp_lam (E₃ (G (F x)))
       (BinProductArrow C₃
          (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G HG
             (BC₂ (F x) (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
          (BinProductPr1 C₃
             (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))))
          (BinProductPr2 C₃
             (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))))
        · # G (exp_eval (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
· exp_eval (E₃ (G (F x))) (G (F y)) = ?b

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
BinProductOfArrows C₃
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
  (identity (G (F x)))
  (# G
     (exp_lam (E₂ (F x))
        (BinProductArrow C₂
           (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
              (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
           (BinProductPr1 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
           (BinProductPr2 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
         · # F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y))))
· BinProductOfArrows C₃
    (BC₃ (G (F x)) (exp (E₃ (G (F x))) (G (F y))))
    (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
    (identity (G (F x)))
    (exp_lam (E₃ (G (F x)))
       (BinProductArrow C₃
          (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G HG
             (BC₂ (F x) (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
          (BinProductPr1 C₃
             (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))))
          (BinProductPr2 C₃
             (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))))
        · # G (exp_eval (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
· exp_eval (E₃ (G (F x))) (G (F y)) = ?b

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
BinProductOfArrows C₃
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
  (identity (G (F x)))
  (# G
     (exp_lam (E₂ (F x))
        (BinProductArrow C₂
           (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
              (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
           (BinProductPr1 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
           (BinProductPr2 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
         · # F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y))))
· (BinProductOfArrows C₃
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (exp (E₃ (G (F x))) (G (F y))))
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
     (identity (G (F x)))
     (exp_lam (E₃ (G (F x)))
        (BinProductArrow C₃
           (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G HG
              (BC₂ (F x) (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
           (BinProductPr1 C₃
              (BC₃ (G (F x))
                 (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))))
           (BinProductPr2 C₃
              (BC₃ (G (F x))
                 (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))))
         · # G (exp_eval (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
   · exp_eval (E₃ (G (F x))) (G (F y))) = ?b

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
BinProductOfArrows C₃
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
  (identity (G (F x)))
  (# G
     (exp_lam (E₂ (F x))
        (BinProductArrow C₂
           (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
              (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
           (BinProductPr1 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
           (BinProductPr2 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
         · # F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y))))
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G HG
        (BC₂ (F x) (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃
        (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃
        (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))))
   · # G (exp_eval (E₂ (F x)) (F y))) = ?b

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
BinProductOfArrows C₃
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
  (identity (G (F x)))
  (# G
     (exp_lam (E₂ (F x))
        (BinProductArrow C₂
           (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
              (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
           (BinProductPr1 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
           (BinProductPr2 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
         · # F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y))))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G HG
       (BC₂ (F x) (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃
       (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃
       (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))))
· # G (exp_eval (E₂ (F x)) (F y)) = ?b

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
BinProductOfArrows C₃
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
  (# G (identity (F x)))
  (# G
     (exp_lam (E₂ (F x))
        (BinProductArrow C₂
           (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
              (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
           (BinProductPr1 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
           (BinProductPr2 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
         · # F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y))))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G HG
       (BC₂ (F x) (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃
       (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃
       (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))))
· # G (exp_eval (E₂ (F x)) (F y)) = ?b

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
BinProductOfArrows C₃
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
  (# G (identity (F x)))
  (# G
     (exp_lam (E₂ (F x))
        (BinProductArrow C₂
           (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
              (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
           (BinProductPr1 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
           (BinProductPr2 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
         · # F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y))))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G HG
       (BC₂ (F x) (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃
       (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃
       (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))) =
?y'

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
?y' =
BinProductOfArrows C₃
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
  (# G (identity (F x)))
  (# G
     (exp_lam (E₂ (F x))
        (BinProductArrow C₂
           (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
              (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
           (BinProductPr1 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
           (BinProductPr2 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
         · # F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y))))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G HG
       (BC₂ (F x) (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y))))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃
       (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃
       (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))))

      apply preserves_binproduct_of_arrows.
    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G HG
     (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
· # G
    (BinProductOfArrows C₂
       (BC₂ (F x) (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))
       (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))) (identity (F x))
       (exp_lam (E₂ (F x))
          (BinProductArrow C₂
             (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
                (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
             (BinProductPr1 C₂
                (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
             (BinProductPr2 C₂
                (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
           · # F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y))))
· # G (exp_eval (E₂ (F x)) (F y)) =
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct (F ∙ G)
     (composition_preserves_binproduct HF HG)
     (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
· # G (# F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G HG
     (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
· (# G
     (BinProductOfArrows C₂
        (BC₂ (F x) (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))
        (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))
        (identity (F x))
        (exp_lam (E₂ (F x))
           (BinProductArrow C₂
              (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
                 (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
              (BinProductPr1 C₂
                 (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
              (BinProductPr2 C₂
                 (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
            · # F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y))))
   · # G (exp_eval (E₂ (F x)) (F y))) =
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct (F ∙ G)
     (composition_preserves_binproduct HF HG)
     (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
· # G (# F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G HG
     (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
· (# G
     (BinProductOfArrows C₂
        (BC₂ (F x) (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))
        (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))
        (identity (F x))
        (exp_lam (E₂ (F x))
           (BinProductArrow C₂
              (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
                 (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
              (BinProductPr1 C₂
                 (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
              (BinProductPr2 C₂
                 (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
            · # F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y))))
   · # G (exp_eval (E₂ (F x)) (F y))) = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
?b =
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct (F ∙ G)
     (composition_preserves_binproduct HF HG)
     (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
· # G (# F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y))

BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃

E₃: Exponentials BC₃

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G HG
     (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
· (# G
     (BinProductOfArrows C₂
        (BC₂ (F x) (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))
        (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))
        (identity (F x))
        (exp_lam (E₂ (F x))
           (BinProductArrow C₂
              (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
                 (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
              (BinProductPr1 C₂
                 (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
              (BinProductPr2 C₂
                 (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
            · # F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y))))
   · # G (exp_eval (E₂ (F x)) (F y))) = ?b

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃

E₃: Exponentials BC₃

HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
# G
  (BinProductOfArrows C₂
     (BC₂ (F x) (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))
     (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))) (identity (F x))
     (exp_lam (E₂ (F x))
        (BinProductArrow C₂
           (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
              (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
           (BinProductPr1 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
           (BinProductPr2 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
         · # F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y))))
· # G (exp_eval (E₂ (F x)) (F y)) = ?t2

BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃

E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃

HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
# G
  (BinProductOfArrows C₂
     (BC₂ (F x) (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))
     (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))) (identity (F x))
     (exp_lam (E₂ (F x))
        (BinProductArrow C₂
           (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
              (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
           (BinProductPr1 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
           (BinProductPr2 C₂
              (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
         · # F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y)))
   · exp_eval (E₂ (F x)) (F y)) = ?t2

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
BinProductOfArrows C₂
  (BC₂ (F x) (exp (E₂ (F x)) (F y)))
  (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))) (identity (F x))
  (exp_lam (E₂ (F x))
     (BinProductArrow C₂
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
           (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
        (BinProductPr1 C₂
           (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
        (BinProductPr2 C₂
           (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
      · # F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y)))
· exp_eval (E₂ (F x)) (F y) = ?t2

      apply exp_beta.
    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G HG
     (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
· # G
    (BinProductArrow C₂
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
          (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
       (BinProductPr1 C₂
          (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
       (BinProductPr2 C₂
          (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
     · # F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y)) =
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct (F ∙ G)
     (composition_preserves_binproduct HF HG)
     (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
· # G (# F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y))

inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G HG
     (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
· (# G
     (BinProductArrow C₂
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
           (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
        (BinProductPr1 C₂
           (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))

   · # G (# F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y))) =

  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct (F ∙ G)
     (composition_preserves_binproduct HF HG)
     (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
· # G (# F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y))

x, y: C₁
inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G HG
     (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))

          (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))

  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct (F ∙ G)
     (composition_preserves_binproduct HF HG)
     (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))

· # G (# F (exp_eval (E₁ x) y))

BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃

E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G HG
     (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
· # G
    (BinProductArrow C₂
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
          (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
       (BinProductPr1 C₂
          (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
       (BinProductPr2 C₂
          (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))) =
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct (F ∙ G)
     (composition_preserves_binproduct HF HG)
     (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃
     (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
# G
  (BinProductArrow C₂
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
        (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G HG
  (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct (F ∙ G)
       (composition_preserves_binproduct HF HG)
       (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃
       (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃
       (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
# G
  (BinProductArrow C₂
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
        (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))) =
?b
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
?b =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G HG
  (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct (F ∙ G)
       (composition_preserves_binproduct HF HG)
       (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃
       (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃
       (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
# G
  (BinProductArrow C₂
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
        (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))) =
?b

      apply (preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_arrow
               G HG
               (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
               (BC₃ _ _)).
    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
BinProductArrow C₃
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
  (# G
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
  (# G
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G HG
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
          (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
       (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G HG
  (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct (F ∙ G)
       (composition_preserves_binproduct HF HG)
       (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃
       (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃
       (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
BinProductArrow C₃
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
  (# G
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
  (# G
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G HG
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
          (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y))))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃
       (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃
       (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))) =
BinProductArrow C₃
  (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y))))
  (# G (pr121 (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
  (# G (pr221 (BC₂ (F x) (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct (F ∙ G)
       (composition_preserves_binproduct HF HG)
       (BC₁ x (exp (E₁ x) y)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃
       (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃
       (BC₃ (G (F x)) (G (F (exp (E₁ x) y)))))

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
preserves_exponentials E₁ E₃
  (composition_preserves_binproduct HF HG)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
preserves_exponentials E₁ E₃
  (composition_preserves_binproduct HF HG)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
is_z_isomorphism
  (preserves_exponentials_map E₁ E₃
     (composition_preserves_binproduct HF HG) x y)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
C₃ ⟦ (F ∙ G) (exp (E₁ x) y),
exp (E₃ ((F ∙ G) x)) ((F ∙ G) y) ⟧
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
?f =
preserves_exponentials_map E₁ E₃
  (composition_preserves_binproduct HF HG) x y
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
is_z_isomorphism ?f

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
C₃ ⟦ (F ∙ G) (exp (E₁ x) y),
exp (E₃ ((F ∙ G) x)) ((F ∙ G) y) ⟧
 exact (#G(preserves_exponentials_map E₁ E₂ HF x y)
             · preserves_exponentials_map E₂ E₃ HG (F x) (F y)).
    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
# G (preserves_exponentials_map E₁ E₂ HF x y)
· preserves_exponentials_map E₂ E₃ HG (F x) (F y) =
preserves_exponentials_map E₁ E₃
  (composition_preserves_binproduct HF HG) x y
 apply comp_preserves_exponentials_eq.
    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
is_z_isomorphism
  (# G (preserves_exponentials_map E₁ E₂ HF x y)
   · preserves_exponentials_map E₂ E₃ HG (F x) (F y))
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁

BC₃: BinProducts C₃

E₃: Exponentials BC₃

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
is_z_isomorphism
  (# G (preserves_exponentials_map E₁ E₂ HF x y))

BC₃: BinProducts C₃

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
is_z_isomorphism
  (preserves_exponentials_map E₂ E₃ HG (F x) (F y))

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃

HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
