C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
is_z_isomorphism
  (preserves_exponentials_map E₁ E₂ HF x y)

        apply HFE.
      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
BC₃: BinProducts C₃
E₁: Exponentials BC₁
E₂: Exponentials BC₂
E₃: Exponentials BC₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HFE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₂ HF
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: preserves_binproduct G
HGE: preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ HG
x, y: C₁
is_z_isomorphism
  (preserves_exponentials_map E₂ E₃ HG (F x) (F y))
 apply HGE.
  Defined.
End CompPreserves.

(** * 4. Transport along an adjoint equivalence *)
Section ExponentialsCarriedThroughAdjointEquivalence.

  Context {C : category} (PC : BinProducts C) {D : category} (PD : BinProducts D)
    (ExpC : Exponentials PC) (adjeq : adj_equiv C D).

  Let F : functor C D := adjeq.
  Let G : functor D C := adj_equivalence_inv adjeq.
  Let η_z_iso : ∏ (c : C), z_iso c (G (F c)) := unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence adjeq.
  Let ε_z_iso : ∏ (d : D), z_iso (F (G d)) d := counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence adjeq.
  Let η_nat_z_iso : nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (functor_composite F G) :=
        unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats adjeq.
  Let ε_nat_z_iso : nat_z_iso  (functor_composite G F) (functor_identity D) :=
        counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats adjeq.

  Let FC (c : C) : functor C C := constprod_functor1 PC c.
  Let GC (c : C) : functor C C := right_adjoint (ExpC c).
  Let ηC (c : C) : functor_identity C ⟹ (FC c) ∙ (GC c) := unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c).
  Let εC (c : C) : functor_composite (GC c) (FC c) ⟹ functor_identity C := counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c).

  Section FixAnObject.

    Context (d0 : D).

    Let Fd0 : functor D D := constprod_functor1 PD d0.
    Let Gd0 : functor D D := functor_composite (functor_composite G (GC (G d0))) F.

    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
BinProduct C (G d0) (G d)

    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
BinProduct C (G d0) (G d)

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, G d0 ⟧ × C ⟦ p, G d ⟧
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
(λ pp1p2 : ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, G d0 ⟧ × C ⟦ p, G d ⟧,
 isBinProduct C (G d0) (G d) 
   (pr1 pp1p2) (pr12 pp1p2) 
   (pr22 pp1p2)) ?pr1

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, G d0 ⟧ × C ⟦ p, G d ⟧
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
C ⟦ G (pr11 (PD d0 d)), G d0 ⟧
× C ⟦ G (pr11 (PD d0 d)), G d ⟧

        exact (# G (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 (PD d0 d)))),,# G (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 (PD d0 d))))).
      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
(λ pp1p2 : ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, G d0 ⟧ × C ⟦ p, G d ⟧,
 isBinProduct C (G d0) (G d) (pr1 pp1p2) (pr12 pp1p2)
   (pr22 pp1p2))
  (G (pr11 (PD d0 d)),,
   # G (pr121 (PD d0 d)),, # G (pr221 (PD d0 d)))
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
Hpres:= right_adjoint_preserves_binproduct adjeq adjeq
:
preserves_binproduct G: preserves_binproduct G
(λ pp1p2 : ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, G d0 ⟧ × C ⟦ p, G d ⟧,
 isBinProduct C (G d0) (G d) (pr1 pp1p2) (pr12 pp1p2)
   (pr22 pp1p2))
  (G (pr11 (PD d0 d)),,
   # G (pr121 (PD d0 d)),, # G (pr221 (PD d0 d)))

        exact (Hpres _ _ _ _ _ (pr2 (PD d0 d))).
    Defined.

PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D

  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)

εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D

Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
nat_trans_data (G ∙ FC (G d0)) (Fd0 ∙ G)

C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C

  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d

FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
C ⟦ (G ∙ FC (G d0)) d, (Fd0 ∙ G) d ⟧

      exact (BinProductOfArrows _ (inherited_BP_on_C d) (PC (G d0) (G d)) (identity _) (identity _)).
    Defined.

    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C

  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d

  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)

εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
is_nat_trans (G ∙ FC (G d0)) (Fd0 ∙ G)
  μ_nat_trans_data

C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
# (G ∙ FC (G d0)) f · μ_nat_trans_data d =
μ_nat_trans_data d' · # (Fd0 ∙ G) f

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d

  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
# (G ∙ FC (G d0)) f · μ_nat_trans_data d
· BinProductPr1 C (inherited_BP_on_C d) =
μ_nat_trans_data d' · # (Fd0 ∙ G) f
· BinProductPr1 C (inherited_BP_on_C d)

PC: BinProducts C

  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))

η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
μ_nat_trans_data d
· BinProductPr1 C (inherited_BP_on_C d) = ?t2

          apply (BinProductOfArrowsPr1 _ (inherited_BP_on_C d) (PC (G d0) (G d))). 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)

GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
# (G ∙ FC (G d0)) f
· (BinProductPr1 C (PC (G d0) (G d)) · identity (G d0)) =
μ_nat_trans_data d' · # (Fd0 ∙ G) f
· BinProductPr1 C (inherited_BP_on_C d)

C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C

  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d

GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
?b =
μ_nat_trans_data d'
· # G
    (BinProductOfArrows D
       (PD (constant_functor D D d0 d)
          (functor_identity D d))
       (PD (constant_functor D D d0 d')
          (functor_identity D d'))
       (# (constant_functor D D d0) f)
       (# (functor_identity D) f) · pr121 (PD d0 d))

Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
?b =
μ_nat_trans_data d'
· # G
    (BinProductOfArrows D (PD d0 d) (PD d0 d')
       (identity d0) f · pr121 (PD d0 d))

η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
?b = ?b0
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
?b0 =
μ_nat_trans_data d'
· # G
    (BinProductOfArrows D 
       (PD d0 d) (PD d0 d') 
       (identity d0) f · pr121 
     (PD d0 d))

PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC

F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D

  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))

  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d

εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D

f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧

· # G
    (BinProductOfArrows D (PD d0 d) (PD d0 d')
       (identity d0) f · pr121 (PD d0 d))
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d

  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
?t1 =
BinProductOfArrows D (PD d0 d) (PD d0 d')
  (identity d0) f · pr121 (PD d0 d)

                  apply pathsinv0, BinProductOfArrowsPr1.

PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D

d', d: D

· # G (BinProductPr1 D (PD d0 d') · identity d0)

GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C

C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
# (G ∙ FC (G d0)) f
· BinProductPr1 C (PC (G d0) (G d)) =
BinProductPr1 C (PC (G d0) (G d')) · identity (G d0)

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
# (G ∙ FC (G d0)) f
· BinProductPr1 C (PC (G d0) (G d)) =
BinProductPr1 C (PC (G d0) (G d'))

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
BinProduct_of_functors_mor C C PC
  (constant_functor C C (G d0)) (functor_identity C)
  (G d') (G d) (# G f)
· BinProductPr1 C (PC (G d0) (G d)) =
BinProductPr1 C (PC (G d0) (G d'))

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     ((constant_functor_data C C (G d0),,
       is_functor_constant C C (G d0)) (G d))
     ((functor_identity_data C,, is_functor_identity C)
        (G d)))
  (PC
     ((constant_functor_data C C (G d0),,
       is_functor_constant C C (G d0)) (G d'))
     ((functor_identity_data C,, is_functor_identity C)
        (G d')))
  (# (constant_functor_data C C (G d0),,
      is_functor_constant C C (G d0)) (# G f))
  (# (functor_identity_data C,, is_functor_identity C)
     (# G f)) · BinProductPr1 C (PC (G d0) (G d)) =
BinProductPr1 C (PC (G d0) (G d'))

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (PC (G d0) (G d))
  (PC (G d0) (G d')) (identity (G d0)) (# G f)
· BinProductPr1 C (PC (G d0) (G d)) =
BinProductPr1 C (PC (G d0) (G d'))

d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧

  (PC (G d0) (G d')) (identity (G d0)) (# G f)
· BinProductPr1 C (PC (G d0) (G d)) = ?b

PC: BinProducts C

PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D

  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence

GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C

Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (PC (G d0) (G d))
  (PC (G d0) (G d')) (identity (G d0)) (# G f)
· BinProductPr1 C (PC (G d0) (G d)) = ?b
 apply (BinProductOfArrowsPr1 _ (PC (G d0) (G d)) (PC (G d0) (G d'))). 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
BinProductPr1 C (PC (G d0) (G d')) · identity (G d0) =
BinProductPr1 C (PC (G d0) (G d'))

        apply id_right.
      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
# (G ∙ FC (G d0)) f · μ_nat_trans_data d
· BinProductPr2 C (inherited_BP_on_C d) =
μ_nat_trans_data d' · # (Fd0 ∙ G) f
· BinProductPr2 C (inherited_BP_on_C d)

adjeq: adj_equiv C D

GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C

d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
?b =
μ_nat_trans_data d'
· # G
    (BinProduct_of_functors_mor D D PD
       (constant_functor D D d0) (functor_identity D)
       d' d f) · # G (pr221 (PD d0 d))

FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
?b0 =
μ_nat_trans_data d'
· (# G
     (BinProduct_of_functors_mor D D PD
        (constant_functor D D d0) 
        (functor_identity D) d' d f)
   · # G (pr221 (PD d0 d)))

            
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
?b0 =
μ_nat_trans_data d'
· (# G
     (BinProduct_of_functors_mor D D PD
        (constant_functor D D d0) (functor_identity D)
        d' d f) · # G (pr221 (PD d0 d)))
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
?t1 =
# G
  (BinProduct_of_functors_mor D D PD
     (constant_functor D D d0) (functor_identity D) d'
     d f) · # G (pr221 (PD d0 d))

                  apply functor_comp. 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
?b =
μ_nat_trans_data d'
· # G
    (BinProduct_of_functors_mor D D PD
       (constant_functor D D d0) (functor_identity D)
       d' d f · pr221 (PD d0 d))

            
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
?b =
μ_nat_trans_data d'
· # G
    (BinProductOfArrows D
       (PD (constant_functor D D d0 d)
          (functor_identity D d))
       (PD (constant_functor D D d0 d')
          (functor_identity D d'))
       (# (constant_functor D D d0) f)
       (# (functor_identity D) f) · pr221 (PD d0 d))

            
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D

ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d

ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)

GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
?b =
μ_nat_trans_data d'
· # G
    (BinProductOfArrows D (PD d0 d) (PD d0 d')
       (identity d0) f · pr221 (PD d0 d))

GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C

d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧

    (BinProductOfArrows D

C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C

  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))

  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d

  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)

GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D

Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
?t1 =
BinProductOfArrows D (PD d0 d) (PD d0 d')
  (identity d0) f · pr221 (PD d0 d)

                  apply pathsinv0, BinProductOfArrowsPr2.

C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C

  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))

  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d

  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)

GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
# (G ∙ FC (G d0)) f
· BinProductPr2 C (PC (G d0) (G d)) =
BinProductPr2 C (PC (G d0) (G d')) · identity (G d')
· # G f

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
# (G ∙ FC (G d0)) f
· BinProductPr2 C (PC (G d0) (G d)) =
BinProductPr2 C (PC (G d0) (G d')) · # G f

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
BinProduct_of_functors_mor C C PC
  (constant_functor C C (G d0)) (functor_identity C)
  (G d') (G d) (# G f)
· BinProductPr2 C (PC (G d0) (G d)) =
BinProductPr2 C (PC (G d0) (G d')) · # G f

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     ((constant_functor_data C C (G d0),,
       is_functor_constant C C (G d0)) (G d))
     ((functor_identity_data C,, is_functor_identity C)
        (G d)))
  (PC
     ((constant_functor_data C C (G d0),,
       is_functor_constant C C (G d0)) (G d'))
     ((functor_identity_data C,, is_functor_identity C)
        (G d')))
  (# (constant_functor_data C C (G d0),,
      is_functor_constant C C (G d0)) (# G f))
  (# (functor_identity_data C,, is_functor_identity C)
     (# G f)) · BinProductPr2 C (PC (G d0) (G d)) =
BinProductPr2 C (PC (G d0) (G d')) · # G f

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (PC (G d0) (G d))
  (PC (G d0) (G d')) (identity (G d0)) (# G f)
· BinProductPr2 C (PC (G d0) (G d)) =
BinProductPr2 C (PC (G d0) (G d')) · # G f

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C

  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d

  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)

GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (PC (G d0) (G d))
  (PC (G d0) (G d')) (identity (G d0)) (# G f)
· BinProductPr2 C (PC (G d0) (G d)) = ?b
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
?b = BinProductPr2 C (PC (G d0) (G d')) · # G f

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (PC (G d0) (G d))
  (PC (G d0) (G d')) (identity (G d0)) (# G f)
· BinProductPr2 C (PC (G d0) (G d)) = ?b
 apply (BinProductOfArrowsPr2 _ (PC (G d0) (G d)) (PC (G d0) (G d'))). 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d', d: D
f: D ⟦ d', d ⟧
BinProductPr2 C (PC (G d0) (G d')) · # G f =
BinProductPr2 C (PC (G d0) (G d')) · # G f

        apply idpath.
    Qed.

    Local Definition μ_nat_trans : nat_trans (G ∙ FC (G d0)) (Fd0 ∙ G) := _,,μ_nat_trans_law.

    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C

  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)

GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
C ⟦ (Fd0 ∙ G) d, (G ∙ FC (G d0)) d ⟧

    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
C ⟦ (Fd0 ∙ G) d, (G ∙ FC (G d0)) d ⟧

      exact (BinProductOfArrows _ (PC (G d0) (G d)) (inherited_BP_on_C d) (identity _) (identity _)).
    Defined.

    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d

  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)

GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
is_inverse_in_precat (μ_nat_trans d)
  (μ_nat_trans_inv_pointwise d)

is_inverse_in_precat (μ_nat_trans d)
  (μ_nat_trans_inv_pointwise d)

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
μ_nat_trans_data d · μ_nat_trans_inv_pointwise d =
identity
  (BinProduct_of_functors_ob C C PC
     (constant_functor C C (G d0))
     (functor_identity C) (G d))
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
μ_nat_trans_inv_pointwise d · μ_nat_trans_data d =
identity
  (G
     (BinProduct_of_functors_ob D D PD
        (constant_functor D D d0) 
        (functor_identity D) d))

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
μ_nat_trans_data d · μ_nat_trans_inv_pointwise d =
identity
  (BinProduct_of_functors_ob C C PC
     (constant_functor C C (G d0))
     (functor_identity C) (G d))
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)

εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
μ_nat_trans_data d · μ_nat_trans_inv_pointwise d
· BinProductPr1 C
    (PC (constant_functor C C (G d0) (G d))
       (functor_identity C (G d))) =
BinProductPr1 C
  (PC (constant_functor C C (G d0) (G d))
     (functor_identity C (G d)))

C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
BinProductPr1 C (PC (G d0) (G d)) · identity (G d0) =
BinProductPr1 C
  (PC (constant_functor C C (G d0) (G d))
     (functor_identity C (G d)))

          apply id_right.

D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)

εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
μ_nat_trans_data d · μ_nat_trans_inv_pointwise d
· BinProductPr2 C
    (PC (constant_functor C C (G d0) (G d))
       (functor_identity C (G d))) =
BinProductPr2 C
  (PC (constant_functor C C (G d0) (G d))
     (functor_identity C (G d)))

  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
μ_nat_trans_inv_pointwise d · μ_nat_trans_data d =
identity
  (G
     (BinProduct_of_functors_ob D D PD
        (constant_functor D D d0) (functor_identity D)
        d))
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
μ_nat_trans_inv_pointwise d · μ_nat_trans_data d =
identity
  (G
     (PD
        ((constant_functor_data D D d0,,
          is_functor_constant D D d0) d)
        ((functor_identity_data D,,
          is_functor_identity D) d)))

η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
μ_nat_trans_inv_pointwise d
· BinProductPr1 C (PC (G d0) (G d)) = ?b
 apply (BinProductOfArrowsPr1 _ (PC (G d0) (G d)) (inherited_BP_on_C d)).

PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)

GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
BinProductPr1 C (inherited_BP_on_C d)
· identity (G d0) =
BinProductPr1 C (inherited_BP_on_C d)

          apply id_right.

PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC

  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))

d: D

          apply id_right.
    Qed.

    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D

  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d

  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)

  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)

εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
nat_z_iso (G ∙ FC (G d0)) (Fd0 ∙ G)

  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
G ∙ FC (G d0) ⟹ Fd0 ∙ G
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
is_nat_z_iso ?μ

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats

FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D

 exact μ_nat_trans.

C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C

  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
C ⟦ (Fd0 ∙ G) d, (G ∙ FC (G d0)) d ⟧
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
(λ g : C ⟦ (Fd0 ∙ G) d, (G ∙ FC (G d0)) d ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat (μ_nat_trans d) g) 
  ?pr1

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
C ⟦ (Fd0 ∙ G) d, (G ∙ FC (G d0)) d ⟧
 exact (μ_nat_trans_inv_pointwise d).
        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
(λ g : C ⟦ (Fd0 ∙ G) d, (G ∙ FC (G d0)) d ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat (μ_nat_trans d) g)
  (μ_nat_trans_inv_pointwise d)
 exact (μ_nat_trans_is_inverse d).
    Defined.

PC: BinProducts C
D: category

PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D

⟹ (Fd0 ∙ (G ∙ GC (G d0))) ∙ F

C: category
PC: BinProducts C

PD: BinProducts D

PD: BinProducts D

F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
G ∙ functor_identity C ⟹ ?Goal
 apply (pre_whisker G (ηC (G d0))).
      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
functor_composite_data G (FC (G d0) ∙ GC (G d0))
⟹ Fd0 ∙ (G ∙ GC (G d0))
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
(G ∙ FC (G d0)) ∙ GC (G d0) ⟹ (Fd0 ∙ G) ∙ GC (G d0)

PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D

  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d

εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D

Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
G ∙ FC (G d0) ⟹ Fd0 ∙ G

        apply μ.
    Defined.

PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D

PC: BinProducts C

PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
?Goal ⟹ G

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
((G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F) ∙ (Fd0 ∙ G) ⟹ ?Goal
 apply (pre_whisker _ (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv μ)).
        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
functor_composite_data ((G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F)
  (G ∙ FC (G d0)) ⟹ G
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
(((G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F) ∙ G) ∙ FC (G d0) ⟹ G

PD: BinProducts D

C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
functor_data D C
 exact (G ∙ GC (G d0)).
            
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C

  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)

GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
((G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F) ∙ G ⟹ G ∙ GC (G d0)
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
(G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ (F ∙ G)
⟹ (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ functor_identity C

              apply (pre_whisker _ (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv η_nat_z_iso)).
          
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
functor_composite_data (G ∙ GC (G d0)) (FC (G d0)) ⟹ G
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C

  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
G ∙ (GC (G d0) ∙ FC (G d0)) ⟹ G

            apply (pre_whisker _ (εC (G d0))).
    Defined.

    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D

  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))

  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d

  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)

  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)

GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C

εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
adjunction_data D D

D ⟶ D
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)

GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
D ⟶ D

· adjcounit is_expDd0_adjunction_data
