identity (left_functor is_expDd0_adjunction_data d)

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
# Fd0 (ηDd0 d) · εDd0 (Fd0 d) = identity (Fd0 d)

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
# Fd0
  (nat_trans_comp (functor_identity D) (G ∙ F)
     (Fd0 ∙ Gd0) (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv ε_nat_z_iso)
     (post_whisker
        (nat_trans_comp (G ∙ functor_identity C)
           (functor_composite_data G
              (FC (G d0) ∙ GC (G d0)))
           (Fd0 ∙ (G ∙ GC (G d0)))
           (pre_whisker G (ηC (G d0)))
           (post_whisker (pr1 μ) (GC (G d0)))) F) d)
· εDd0 (Fd0 d) = identity (Fd0 d)

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C

  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
# Fd0
  (nat_trans_comp (functor_identity D) (G ∙ F)
     (Fd0 ∙ Gd0) (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv ε_nat_z_iso)
     (post_whisker
        (nat_trans_comp (G ∙ functor_identity C)
           (functor_composite_data G
              (FC (G d0) ∙ GC (G d0)))
           (Fd0 ∙ (G ∙ GC (G d0)))
           (pre_whisker G (ηC (G d0)))
           (post_whisker (pr1 μ) (GC (G d0)))) F) d)
· εDd0 (Fd0 d) = ?b
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
?b = identity (Fd0 d)

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
# Fd0
  (nat_trans_comp (functor_identity D) (G ∙ F)
     (Fd0 ∙ Gd0) (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv ε_nat_z_iso)
     (post_whisker
        (nat_trans_comp (G ∙ functor_identity C)
           (functor_composite_data G
              (FC (G d0) ∙ GC (G d0)))
           (Fd0 ∙ (G ∙ GC (G d0)))
           (pre_whisker G (ηC (G d0)))
           (post_whisker (pr1 μ) (GC (G d0)))) F) d)
· εDd0 (Fd0 d) = ?b

PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)

GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
# Fd0
  (nat_trans_comp (functor_identity D) (G ∙ F)
     (Fd0 ∙ Gd0) (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv ε_nat_z_iso)
     (post_whisker
        (nat_trans_comp (G ∙ functor_identity C)
           (functor_composite_data G
              (FC (G d0) ∙ GC (G d0)))
           (Fd0 ∙ (G ∙ GC (G d0)))
           (pre_whisker G (ηC (G d0)))
           (post_whisker (pr1 μ) (GC (G d0)))) F) d) =
?f'

  (nat_trans_comp (functor_identity D) (G ∙ F)
     (Fd0 ∙ Gd0) (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv ε_nat_z_iso)
     (post_whisker

           (Fd0 ∙ (G ∙ GC (G d0)))

C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D

  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence

d: D
# Fd0
  (nat_trans_comp (functor_identity D) (G ∙ F)
     (Fd0 ∙ Gd0) (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv ε_nat_z_iso)
     (post_whisker
        (nat_trans_comp (G ∙ functor_identity C)
           (functor_composite_data G
              (FC (G d0) ∙ GC (G d0)))
           (Fd0 ∙ (G ∙ GC (G d0)))
           (pre_whisker G (ηC (G d0)))
           (post_whisker (pr1 μ) (GC (G d0)))) F) d) =
?b
 apply functor_comp. 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
# Fd0 (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv ε_nat_z_iso d)
· # Fd0
    (post_whisker
       (nat_trans_comp (G ∙ functor_identity C)
          (functor_composite_data G
             (FC (G d0) ∙ GC (G d0)))
          (Fd0 ∙ (G ∙ GC (G d0)))
          (pre_whisker G (ηC (G d0)))
          (post_whisker (pr1 μ) (GC (G d0)))) F d) =
?f'

          
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
post_whisker
  (nat_trans_comp (G ∙ functor_identity C)
     (functor_composite_data G (FC (G d0) ∙ GC (G d0)))
     (Fd0 ∙ (G ∙ GC (G d0)))
     (pre_whisker G (ηC (G d0)))
     (post_whisker (pr1 μ) (GC (G d0)))) F d = ?t2

          
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
Hpost: post_whisker
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data G
        (functor_identity C))
     (functor_composite_data G
        (FC (G d0) ∙ GC (G d0)))
     (functor_composite_data 
        (Fd0 ∙ G) (GC (G d0)))
     (pre_whisker G (ηC (G d0)))
     (post_whisker (pr1 μ) (GC (G d0)))) F =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data G
        (functor_identity C)) F)
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data G
        (FC (G d0) ∙ GC (G d0))) F)
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data 
        (Fd0 ∙ G) (GC (G d0))) F)
  (post_whisker (pre_whisker G (ηC (G d0))) F)
  (post_whisker
     (post_whisker (pr1 μ) (GC (G d0))) F)
post_whisker
  (nat_trans_comp (G ∙ functor_identity C)
     (functor_composite_data G (FC (G d0) ∙ GC (G d0)))
     (Fd0 ∙ (G ∙ GC (G d0)))
     (pre_whisker G (ηC (G d0)))
     (post_whisker (pr1 μ) (GC (G d0)))) F d = ?t2

          refine (toforallpaths _ _ _ (maponpaths pr1 Hpost) d).
        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
# Fd0 (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv ε_nat_z_iso d)
· # Fd0
    (pr1
       (nat_trans_comp
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data G
                (functor_identity C)) F)
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data G
                (FC (G d0) ∙ GC (G d0))) F)
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data (Fd0 ∙ G)
                (GC (G d0))) F)
          (post_whisker (pre_whisker G (ηC (G d0))) F)
          (post_whisker
             (post_whisker (pr1 μ) (GC (G d0))) F)) d)
· εDd0 (Fd0 d) = identity (Fd0 d)

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
# Fd0 (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv ε_nat_z_iso d)
· # Fd0
    (pr1
       (nat_trans_comp
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data G
                (functor_identity C)) F)
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data G
                (FC (G d0) ∙ GC (G d0))) F)
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data (Fd0 ∙ G)
                (GC (G d0))) F)
          (post_whisker (pre_whisker G (ηC (G d0))) F)
          (post_whisker
             (post_whisker (pr1 μ) (GC (G d0))) F)) d)
· εDd0 (Fd0 d) = ?b

D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D

GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
?b = identity (Fd0 d)

PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D

d: D
# Fd0 (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv ε_nat_z_iso d)
· # Fd0
    (pr1
       (nat_trans_comp
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data G
                (functor_identity C)) F)
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data G
                (FC (G d0) ∙ GC (G d0))) F)
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data (Fd0 ∙ G)
                (GC (G d0))) F)
          (post_whisker (pre_whisker G (ηC (G d0))) F)

             (post_whisker (pr1 μ) (GC (G d0))) F)) d)
· εDd0 (Fd0 d) = ?b
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
# Fd0 (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv ε_nat_z_iso d)
· # Fd0
    (pr1
       (nat_trans_comp
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data G
                (functor_identity C)) F)
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data G
                (FC (G d0) ∙ GC (G d0))) F)
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data (Fd0 ∙ G)
                (GC (G d0))) F)
          (post_whisker (pre_whisker G (ηC (G d0))) F)
          (post_whisker
             (post_whisker (pr1 μ) (GC (G d0))) F)) d) =
?f'

          
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
# Fd0
  (pr1
     (nat_trans_comp
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data G
              (functor_identity C)) F)
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data G
              (FC (G d0) ∙ GC (G d0))) F)
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data (Fd0 ∙ G)
              (GC (G d0))) F)
        (post_whisker (pre_whisker G (ηC (G d0))) F)
        (post_whisker
           (post_whisker (pr1 μ) (GC (G d0))) F)) d) =
?t2

          apply functor_comp. 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
# Fd0 (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv ε_nat_z_iso d)
· (# Fd0
     (post_whisker (pre_whisker G (ηC (G d0))) F d)
   · # Fd0
       (post_whisker
          (post_whisker (pr1 μ) (GC (G d0))) F d))
· εDd0 (Fd0 d) = identity (Fd0 d)

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
F:= adjeq: C ⟶ D
G:= adj_equivalence_inv adjeq: D ⟶ C
η_z_iso:= unit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ c : C, z_iso c (G (F c))
ε_z_iso:= counit_pointwise_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence
  adjeq: ∏ d : D, z_iso (F (G d)) d
η_nat_z_iso:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
ε_nat_z_iso:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
  adjeq: nat_z_iso (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
FC:= λ c : C, constprod_functor1 PC c: C → C ⟶ C
GC:= λ c : C, right_adjoint (ExpC c): C → C ⟶ C
ηC:= λ c : C, unit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, functor_identity C ⟹ FC c ∙ GC c
εC:= λ c : C, counit_from_left_adjoint (ExpC c): ∏ c : C, GC c ∙ FC c ⟹ functor_identity C
d0: D
Fd0:= constprod_functor1 PD d0: D ⟶ D
Gd0:= (G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F: D ⟶ D
d: D
# Fd0 (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv ε_nat_z_iso d)
· (# Fd0
     (post_whisker (pre_whisker G (ηC (G d0))) F d)
   · # Fd0
       (post_whisker
          (post_whisker (pr1 μ) (GC (G d0))) F d))
· nat_trans_comp (Gd0 ∙ Fd0) (G ∙ F)
    (functor_identity D)
    (nat_trans_comp ((Gd0 ∙ Fd0) ∙ functor_identity D)
       (functor_composite_data (Gd0 ∙ Fd0) (G ∙ F))
       (G ∙ F)
       (pre_whisker (Gd0 ∙ Fd0)
          (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv ε_nat_z_iso))
       (post_whisker
          (nat_trans_comp
             (((G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F) ∙ (Fd0 ∙ G))
             (functor_composite_data
                ((G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F) (G ∙ FC (G d0)))
             G
             (pre_whisker ((G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F)
                (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv μ))
             (nat_trans_comp
                ((((G ∙ GC (G d0)) ∙ F) ∙ G)
                 ∙ FC (G d0))
                (functor_composite_data
                   (G ∙ GC (G d0)) (FC (G d0))) G
                (post_whisker
                   (pre_whisker (G ∙ GC (G d0))
                      (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
                         η_nat_z_iso)) (FC (G d0)))
                (pre_whisker G (εC (G d0))))) F))
    ε_nat_z_iso (Fd0 d) = identity (Fd0 d)

    (* so it is in principle possible to work with this definition, but every step takes an effort,
      requiring a perfect proof on paper before

        rewrite functor_comp.
        use BinProductArrowsEq.
        + rewrite id_left.


          cbn. unfold BinProduct_of_functors_mor.
          rewrite id_left.
          unfold BinProduct_of_functors_ob, constant_functor, functor_identity.
          cbn.
          etrans.
          { apply cancel_postcomposition.
            apply
          admit.
        + cbn. unfold BinProduct_of_functors_mor.
          rewrite id_left.
          unfold BinProduct_of_functors_ob, constant_functor, functor_identity.
          cbn.
          (* is this supposed to be analogous? *)
          admit.
      - intro d. show_id_type. (* F-images in source and target of the morphisms *)
        cbn.
        admit.
    *)
    Abort.

    (*
    Definition is_expDd0_adjunction : adjunction D D := _,,is_expDd0_adjunction_laws.

    Local Definition is_expDd0 : is_exponentiable PD d0.
    Proof.
      exists Gd0.
      exact is_expDd0_adjunction.
    Defined.
    *)

    (* an experiment towards using univalence for this proof
    Lemma is_expDd0_adjunction_laws_equal_cats (Heq : C = D) (*(PCeq : transportf _ Heq PC = PD)*) :
      form_adjunction' is_expDd0_adjunction_data.
    Proof.
      induction Heq.
    *)

  End FixAnObject.
  (*
  Definition exponentials_through_adj_equivalence : Exponentials PD.
  Proof.
    intro d0. exact (is_expDd0 d0).
  Defined.
  *)

End ExponentialsCarriedThroughAdjointEquivalence.

Section AlternativeWithUnivalence.

  Context {C : category} (PC : BinProducts C) {D : category} (PD : BinProducts D)
    (ExpC : Exponentials PC) (adjeq : adj_equiv C D) (Cuniv : is_univalent C) (Duniv : is_univalent D).

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
Cuniv: is_univalent C
Duniv: is_univalent D
C = D

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
Cuniv: is_univalent C
Duniv: is_univalent D
C = D

    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
Cuniv: is_univalent C
Duniv: is_univalent D
C = D
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
Cuniv: is_univalent C
Duniv: is_univalent D
aux: C = D
C = D

    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
Cuniv: is_univalent C
Duniv: is_univalent D
C = D
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
Cuniv: is_univalent C
Duniv: is_univalent D
catiso C D

      apply (adj_equivalence_of_cats_to_cat_iso adjeq); assumption. 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
Cuniv: is_univalent C
Duniv: is_univalent D
aux: C = D
C = D

    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
Cuniv: is_univalent C
Duniv: is_univalent D
aux: C = D
isPredicate (λ x : precategory, has_homsets x)
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
Cuniv: is_univalent C
Duniv: is_univalent D
aux: C = D
pr1 C = pr1 D
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
Cuniv: is_univalent C
Duniv: is_univalent D
aux: C = D
x: precategory
isaprop (has_homsets x)
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
Cuniv: is_univalent C
Duniv: is_univalent D
aux: C = D
pr1 C = pr1 D
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
Cuniv: is_univalent C
Duniv: is_univalent D
aux: C = D
pr1 C = pr1 D

    exact aux.
  Qed.

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
Cuniv: is_univalent C
Duniv: is_univalent D
Exponentials PD

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
D: category
PD: BinProducts D
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C D
Cuniv: is_univalent C
Duniv: is_univalent D
Exponentials PD

PC, PD: BinProducts C
ExpC: Exponentials PC
adjeq: adj_equiv C C
Cuniv, Duniv: is_univalent C
Exponentials PD

PC, PD: BinProducts C
ExpC: Exponentials PC
Cuniv, Duniv: is_univalent C
Exponentials PD

PC, PD: BinProducts C
ExpC: Exponentials PC
Cuniv, Duniv: is_univalent C
PC = PD

ExpC: Exponentials PC
Cuniv, Duniv: is_univalent C
aux: PC = PD

PC, PD: BinProducts C
ExpC: Exponentials PC

aux: PC = PD
Exponentials PC
 exact ExpC.

PC, PD: BinProducts C
ExpC: Exponentials PC
Cuniv, Duniv: is_univalent C
PC = PD

PC, PD: BinProducts C
ExpC: Exponentials PC
Cuniv, Duniv: is_univalent C
PC ~ PD

PC, PD: BinProducts C
ExpC: Exponentials PC
Cuniv, Duniv: is_univalent C

PC c1 = PD c1

    
C: category
PC, PD: BinProducts C
ExpC: Exponentials PC
Cuniv, Duniv: is_univalent C
c1: C
PC c1 ~ PD c1

    
C: category
PC, PD: BinProducts C
ExpC: Exponentials PC
Cuniv, Duniv: is_univalent C
c1, c2: C
PC c1 c2 = PD c1 c2

    apply isaprop_BinProduct; exact Cuniv.
  Defined.

End AlternativeWithUnivalence.

(** * 5. Exponentials are independent of the choice of the binary products *)

(**
 Note that the proof below can be simplified if we assume that [C] is univalent.
 However, we need this statement also for categories that are not univalent.
 *)
Section ExpIndependent.
  Context {C : category}
          (BC₁ BC₂ : BinProducts C)
          (E : Exponentials BC₁).

  
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
   f =
   # (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
   · (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
        (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y))

  
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
   f =
   # (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
   · (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
        (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y))

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
   f =
   # (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
   · (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
        (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y))

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
g₁ = g₂

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: # (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) (pr1 g₁)
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y) =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) (pr1 g₂)
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
g₁ = g₂

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProduct_of_functors_mor C C BC₂
  (constant_functor C C x) (functor_identity C) z
  (exp (E x) y) (pr1 g₁)
· (BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
   · exp_eval (E x) y) =
BinProduct_of_functors_mor C C BC₂
  (constant_functor C C x) (functor_identity C) z
  (exp (E x) y) (pr1 g₂)
· (BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
   · exp_eval (E x) y)
g₁ = g₂

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProductOfArrows C
  (BC₂ (constant_functor C C x (exp (E x) y))
     (functor_identity C (exp (E x) y)))
  (BC₂ (constant_functor C C x z)
     (functor_identity C z))
  (# (constant_functor C C x) (pr1 g₁))
  (# (functor_identity C) (pr1 g₁))
· (BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
   · exp_eval (E x) y) =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (BC₂ (constant_functor C C x (exp (E x) y))
     (functor_identity C (exp (E x) y)))
  (BC₂ (constant_functor C C x z)
     (functor_identity C z))
  (# (constant_functor C C x) (pr1 g₂))
  (# (functor_identity C) (pr1 g₂))
· (BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
   · exp_eval (E x) y)
g₁ = g₂

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProductOfArrows C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BC₂ x z) (identity x) (pr1 g₁)
· (BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
   · exp_eval (E x) y) =
BinProductOfArrows C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BC₂ x z) (identity x) (pr1 g₂)
· (BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
   · exp_eval (E x) y)
g₁ = g₂

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProductOfArrows C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BC₂ x z) (identity x) (pr1 g₁)
· BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
    (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
    (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
· exp_eval (E x) y =
BinProductOfArrows C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BC₂ x z) (identity x) (pr1 g₂)
· BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
    (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
    (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
· exp_eval (E x) y
g₁ = g₂

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₂ x z) (identity x) (pr1 g₁)
   · BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₂ x z) (identity x) (pr1 g₁)
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
· exp_eval (E x) y =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₂ x z) (identity x) (pr1 g₂)
   · BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₂ x z) (identity x) (pr1 g₂)
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
· exp_eval (E x) y
g₁ = g₂

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z) · identity x)
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₂ x z) (identity x) (pr1 g₁)
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
· exp_eval (E x) y =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z) · identity x)
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₂ x z) (identity x) (pr1 g₂)
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
· exp_eval (E x) y
g₁ = g₂

· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z) · identity x)
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₁)
· exp_eval (E x) y =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))

     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₁)
· exp_eval (E x) y =

C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₁)
· exp_eval (E x) y =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₂)
· exp_eval (E x) y
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
   f =
   # (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) x0
   · (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
        (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y))

x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧

f =

· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₁)
· exp_eval (E x) y =

  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))

· exp_eval (E x) y

C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₁)
· exp_eval (E x) y =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₂)
· exp_eval (E x) y
x0: C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧
isaprop
  (f =
   # (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) x0
   · (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
        (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y))

      apply homset_property.

BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧

     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₁)
· exp_eval (E x) y =

· exp_eval (E x) y

C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))

· exp_eval (E x) y =

  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₂)
· exp_eval (E x) y
exp_lam (E x)
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x z) (identity x) (pr1 g₁)
   · exp_eval (E x) y) =
exp_lam (E x)
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x z) (identity x) (pr1 g₂)
   · exp_eval (E x) y)

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₁)
· exp_eval (E x) y =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₂)
· exp_eval (E x) y
BinProductOfArrows C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) (BC₁ x z)
  (identity x) (pr1 g₁) · exp_eval (E x) y =
BinProductOfArrows C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) (BC₁ x z)
  (identity x) (pr1 g₂) · exp_eval (E x) y

· exp_eval (E x) y

BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₁)
· exp_eval (E x) y =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₂)
· exp_eval (E x) y

· exp_eval (E x) y =
BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
· (BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₁)
   · exp_eval (E x) y)

BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₁)
· exp_eval (E x) y =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₂)
· exp_eval (E x) y

  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z) · pr1 g₁)
· exp_eval (E x) y =
BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
· BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
    (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))

· exp_eval (E x) y

      
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'

· BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
    (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
    (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₁)

      
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₁)
· exp_eval (E x) y =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₂)
· exp_eval (E x) y
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z) · pr1 g₁) =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
   · BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
   · (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₁))

      
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₁)
· exp_eval (E x) y =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₂)
· exp_eval (E x) y
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z) · pr1 g₁) =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
   · (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₁))

E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₁)
· exp_eval (E x) y =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₂)
· exp_eval (E x) y
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z) · pr1 g₁) =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₁)

      
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₁)
· exp_eval (E x) y =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₂)
· exp_eval (E x) y
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z) · pr1 g₁) =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z) · pr1 g₁)

      apply idpath.
    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₁)
· exp_eval (E x) y =

  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₂)
· exp_eval (E x) y
iso_between_BinProduct (BC₁ x z) (BC₂ x z)
· (BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₂)
   · exp_eval (E x) y) =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z) · pr1 g₂)
· exp_eval (E x) y

BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₁)
· exp_eval (E x) y =

     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
   · (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₂)) =

  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))

C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₁)
· exp_eval (E x) y =

  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
