· exp_eval (E x) y
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₂) =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z) · pr1 g₂)

      
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f' : C ⟦ z, exp (E x) y ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) f'
· (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
p: BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₁)
· exp_eval (E x) y =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z) · pr1 g₂)
· exp_eval (E x) y
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z) · pr1 g₂) =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z) · pr1 g₂)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
f =
BinProductOfArrows C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)) (BC₂ x z)
  (identity x)
  (exp_lam (E x)
     (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f))
· (BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
   · exp_eval (E x) y)

  
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
f =
BinProductOfArrows C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)) (BC₂ x z)
  (identity x)
  (exp_lam (E x)
     (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f))
· (BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
   · exp_eval (E x) y)

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
z_iso_inv (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x z) (BC₁ x z))
· f =
z_iso_inv (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x z) (BC₁ x z))
· (BinProductOfArrows C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₂ x z) (identity x)
     (exp_lam (E x)
        (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
           (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
           (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f))
   · (BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
      · exp_eval (E x) y))

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) (BC₁ x z)
  (identity x)
  (exp_lam (E x)
     (z_iso_inv
        (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x z) (BC₁ x z))
      · f)) · exp_eval (E x) y =
z_iso_inv (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x z) (BC₁ x z))
· (BinProductOfArrows C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BC₂ x z) (identity x)
     (exp_lam (E x)
        (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
           (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
           (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f))
   · (BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
      · exp_eval (E x) y))

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) (BC₁ x z)
  (identity x)
  (exp_lam (E x)
     (z_iso_inv
        (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x z) (BC₁ x z))
      · f)) · exp_eval (E x) y =
z_iso_inv (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x z) (BC₁ x z))
· BinProductOfArrows C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)) (BC₂ x z)
    (identity x)
    (exp_lam (E x)
       (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
          (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
          (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f))
· BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
    (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
    (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
· exp_eval (E x) y

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) (BC₁ x z)
  (identity x)
  (exp_lam (E x)
     (z_iso_inv
        (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x z) (BC₁ x z))
      · f)) =
z_iso_inv (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x z) (BC₁ x z))
· BinProductOfArrows C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)) (BC₂ x z)
    (identity x)
    (exp_lam (E x)
       (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
          (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
          (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f))
· BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
    (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
    (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) (BC₁ x z)
  (identity x)
  (exp_lam (E x)
     (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f)) =
BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
· BinProductOfArrows C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)) (BC₂ x z)
    (identity x)
    (exp_lam (E x)
       (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
          (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
          (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f))
· BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
    (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
    (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
· BinProductOfArrows C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)) (BC₂ x z)
    (identity x)
    (exp_lam (E x)
       (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
          (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
          (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f))
· BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
    (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
    (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))) =
BinProductOfArrows C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) (BC₁ x z)
  (identity x)
  (exp_lam (E x)
     (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f))

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
· BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
    (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z) · identity x)
    (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z)
     · exp_lam (E x)
         (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
            (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
            (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f))
· BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
    (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
    (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))) =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z) · identity x)
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)
   · exp_lam (E x)
       (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
          (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
          (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f))

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
      · (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z) · identity x))
     (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
      · (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z)
         · exp_lam (E x)
             (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
                (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
                (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f)))
   · BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
      · (BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z) · identity x))
     (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
      · (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z)
         · exp_lam (E x)
             (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
                (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
                (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f)))
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))) =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z) · identity x)
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)
   · exp_lam (E x)
       (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
          (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
          (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f))

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
      · BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
     (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
      · (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z)
         · exp_lam (E x)
             (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
                (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
                (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f)))
   · BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
      · BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
     (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
      · (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z)
         · exp_lam (E x)
             (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
                (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
                (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f)))
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))) =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)
   · exp_lam (E x)
       (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
          (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
          (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f))

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
      · BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
     (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
      · (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z)
         · exp_lam (E x)
             (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
                (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
                (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f)))
   · BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
      · BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
     (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
      · (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z)
         · exp_lam (E x)
             (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
                (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
                (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f)))
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))) = ?b
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
?b =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)
   · exp_lam (E x)
       (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
          (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
          (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f))

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
      · BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
     (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
      · (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z)
         · exp_lam (E x)
             (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
                (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
                (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f)))
   · BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
      · BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
     (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
      · (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z)
         · exp_lam (E x)
             (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
                (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
                (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f)))
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))) = ?b

      
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
   · BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
   · (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z)
      · exp_lam (E x)
          (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
             (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
             (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f)))
· BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)) = ?y'

      
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
   · BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
   · (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z)
      · exp_lam (E x)
          (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
             (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
             (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f)))
· BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)) = ?b
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
?b = ?y'

      
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
   · BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
   · (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z)
      · exp_lam (E x)
          (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
             (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
             (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f)))
· BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)) = ?b

        apply BinProductPr1Commutes.
      
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
· BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z) = ?y'

      apply BinProductPr1Commutes.
    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
     (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
      · BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
     (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
        (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
      · (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z)
         · exp_lam (E x)
             (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
                (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
                (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f)))
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))) =
BinProductArrow C (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)
   · exp_lam (E x)
       (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
          (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
          (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f))

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
   · BinProductPr1 C (BC₂ x z))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
     (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
   · (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z)
      · exp_lam (E x)
          (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
             (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
             (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f)))
· BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)) =
BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)
· exp_lam (E x)
    (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
       (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
       (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f)

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
· (BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z)
   · exp_lam (E x)
       (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
          (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
          (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f)) =
BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)
· exp_lam (E x)
    (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
       (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
       (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f)

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z))
· BinProductPr2 C (BC₂ x z)
· exp_lam (E x)
    (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
       (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
       (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f) =
BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)
· exp_lam (E x)
    (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
       (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
       (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f)

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ BC₂ x z, y ⟧
BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)
· exp_lam (E x)
    (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
       (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
       (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f) =
BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)
· exp_lam (E x)
    (BinProductArrow C (BC₂ x z)
       (BinProductPr1 C (BC₁ x z))
       (BinProductPr2 C (BC₁ x z)) · f)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
Exponentials BC₂

  
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
Exponentials BC₂

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x: C
is_exponentiable BC₂ x

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x: C
∏ x0 : C, coreflection x0 (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x)

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y: C
coreflection y (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x)

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y: C
C
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y: C
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BC₂ x ?c, y ⟧
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y: C
is_coreflection (make_coreflection_data ?c ?f)

    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y: C
C
 exact (exp (E x) y).
    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y: C
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BC₂ x (exp (E x) y), y ⟧
 exact (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y)) (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
             · exp_eval (E x) y).
    
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y: C
is_coreflection
  (make_coreflection_data (exp (E x) y)
     (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
        (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y))
 
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BC₂ x z, y ⟧
∃! g : C ⟦ coreflection_data_object (z,, f),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data (exp (E x) y)
            (iso_between_BinProduct
               (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
               (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
             · exp_eval (E x) y)) ⟧,
z,, f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) g
· make_coreflection_data (exp (E x) y)
    (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
       (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)

      
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BC₂ x z, y ⟧
isaprop
  (∑
   g : C ⟦ coreflection_data_object (z,, f),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data (exp (E x) y)
            (iso_between_BinProduct
               (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
               (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
             · exp_eval (E x) y)) ⟧,
   z,, f =
   # (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) g
   · make_coreflection_data (exp (E x) y)
       (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
          (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y))
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BC₂ x z, y ⟧
∑
g : C ⟦ coreflection_data_object (z,, f),
    coreflection_data_object
      (make_coreflection_data (exp (E x) y)
         (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
            (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y))
    ⟧,
z,, f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) g
· make_coreflection_data (exp (E x) y)
    (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
       (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)

      
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BC₂ x z, y ⟧
isaprop
  (∑
   g : C ⟦ coreflection_data_object (z,, f),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data (exp (E x) y)
            (iso_between_BinProduct
               (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
               (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
             · exp_eval (E x) y)) ⟧,
   z,, f =
   # (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) g
   · make_coreflection_data (exp (E x) y)
       (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
          (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y))
 apply exponentials_independent_eta.
      
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BC₂ x z, y ⟧
∑
g : C ⟦ coreflection_data_object (z,, f),
    coreflection_data_object
      (make_coreflection_data (exp (E x) y)
         (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
            (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y))
    ⟧,
z,, f =
# (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) g
· make_coreflection_data (exp (E x) y)
    (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
       (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)
 
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BC₂ x z, y ⟧
C ⟦ coreflection_data_object (z,, f),
coreflection_data_object
  (make_coreflection_data (exp (E x) y)
     (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
        (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)) ⟧
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BC₂ x z, y ⟧
(λ g : C ⟦ coreflection_data_object (z,, f),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data (exp (E x) y)
            (iso_between_BinProduct
               (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
               (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
             · exp_eval (E x) y)) ⟧,
 z,, f =
 # (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) g
 · make_coreflection_data (exp (E x) y)
     (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
        (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y))
  ?pr1

        
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BC₂ x z, y ⟧
C ⟦ coreflection_data_object (z,, f),
coreflection_data_object
  (make_coreflection_data (exp (E x) y)
     (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
        (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y)) ⟧
 exact (exp_lam (E x) (z_iso_inv (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x z) (BC₁ x z)) · f)).
        
C: category
BC₁, BC₂: BinProducts C
E: Exponentials BC₁
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BC₂ x z, y ⟧
(λ g : C ⟦ coreflection_data_object (z,, f),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data (exp (E x) y)
            (iso_between_BinProduct
               (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
               (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y))
             · exp_eval (E x) y)) ⟧,
 z,, f =
 # (constprod_functor1 BC₂ x) g
 · make_coreflection_data (exp (E x) y)
     (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x (exp (E x) y))
        (BC₁ x (exp (E x) y)) · exp_eval (E x) y))
  (exp_lam (E x)
     (z_iso_inv
        (iso_between_BinProduct (BC₂ x z) (BC₁ x z))
      · f))
 apply exponentials_independent_beta.
  Defined.
End ExpIndependent.

(** * 6. IsExponentiableClosedUnderIso *)
Section IsExponentiableClosedUnderIso.

  
C, D: category
P_D: BinProducts D
F, F', G, G': C ⟶ D
α: nat_z_iso F F'
β: nat_z_iso G G'
nat_z_iso (BinProduct_of_functors C D P_D F G)
  (BinProduct_of_functors C D P_D F' G')

  
C, D: category
P_D: BinProducts D
F, F', G, G': C ⟶ D
α: nat_z_iso F F'
β: nat_z_iso G G'
nat_z_iso (BinProduct_of_functors C D P_D F G)
  (BinProduct_of_functors C D P_D F' G')

    
C, D: category
P_D: BinProducts D
F, F', G, G': C ⟶ D
α: nat_z_iso F F'
β: nat_z_iso G G'
BinProduct_of_functors C D P_D F G
⟹ BinProduct_of_functors C D P_D F' G'
C, D: category
P_D: BinProducts D
F, F', G, G': C ⟶ D
α: nat_z_iso F F'
β: nat_z_iso G G'
is_nat_z_iso ?μ

    
C, D: category
P_D: BinProducts D
F, F', G, G': C ⟶ D
α: nat_z_iso F F'
β: nat_z_iso G G'
BinProduct_of_functors C D P_D F G
⟹ BinProduct_of_functors C D P_D F' G'
 
C, D: category
P_D: BinProducts D
F, F', G, G': C ⟶ D
α: nat_z_iso F F'
β: nat_z_iso G G'
BinProduct_of_functors C D P_D F G ⟹ F'
C, D: category
P_D: BinProducts D
F, F', G, G': C ⟶ D
α: nat_z_iso F F'
β: nat_z_iso G G'
BinProduct_of_functors C D P_D F G ⟹ G'

      
C, D: category
P_D: BinProducts D
F, F', G, G': C ⟶ D
α: nat_z_iso F F'
β: nat_z_iso G G'
BinProduct_of_functors C D P_D F G ⟹ F'
 
C, D: category
P_D: BinProducts D
F, F', G, G': C ⟶ D
α: nat_z_iso F F'
β: nat_z_iso G G'
BinProduct_of_functors C D P_D F G ⟹ F

        apply binproduct_nat_trans_pr1.
      
C, D: category
P_D: BinProducts D
F, F', G, G': C ⟶ D
α: nat_z_iso F F'
β: nat_z_iso G G'
BinProduct_of_functors C D P_D F G ⟹ G'
 
C, D: category
P_D: BinProducts D
F, F', G, G': C ⟶ D
α: nat_z_iso F F'
β: nat_z_iso G G'
BinProduct_of_functors C D P_D F G ⟹ G

        apply binproduct_nat_trans_pr2.
    
C, D: category
P_D: BinProducts D
F, F', G, G': C ⟶ D
α: nat_z_iso F F'
β: nat_z_iso G G'
is_nat_z_iso
  (binproduct_nat_trans C D P_D F' G'
     (BinProduct_of_functors C D P_D F G)
     (nat_trans_comp
        (BinProduct_of_functors C D P_D F G) F F'
        (binproduct_nat_trans_pr1 C D P_D F G) α)
     (nat_trans_comp
        (BinProduct_of_functors C D P_D F G) G G'
        (binproduct_nat_trans_pr2 C D P_D F G) β))
 
C, D: category
P_D: BinProducts D
F, F', G, G': C ⟶ D
α: nat_z_iso F F'
β: nat_z_iso G G'
c: C
is_z_isomorphism
  (binproduct_nat_trans C D P_D F' G'
     (BinProduct_of_functors C D P_D F G)
     (nat_trans_comp
        (BinProduct_of_functors C D P_D F G) F F'
        (binproduct_nat_trans_pr1 C D P_D F G) α)
     (nat_trans_comp
        (BinProduct_of_functors C D P_D F G) G G'
        (binproduct_nat_trans_pr2 C D P_D F G) β) c)

      use (pr2 (binproduct_of_z_iso (P_D _ _) (P_D _ _) (_,,_) (_,,_)))
      ; apply nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso.
  Defined.

  
C: category
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
nat_z_iso (constant_functor C C x)
  (constant_functor C C y)

  
C: category
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
nat_z_iso (constant_functor C C x)
  (constant_functor C C y)

    
C: category
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
constant_functor C C x ⟹ constant_functor C C y
C: category
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
is_nat_z_iso ?μ

    
C: category
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
constant_functor C C x ⟹ constant_functor C C y
 
C: category
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
nat_trans_data (constant_functor C C x)
  (constant_functor C C y)
C: category
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
is_nat_trans (constant_functor C C x)
  (constant_functor C C y) ?t

      
C: category
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
nat_trans_data (constant_functor C C x)
  (constant_functor C C y)
 exact (λ _, i).
      
C: category
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
is_nat_trans (constant_functor C C x)
  (constant_functor C C y) (λ _ : C, i)
 exact (λ _ _ _, id_left _ @ ! id_right _).
    
C: category
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
is_nat_z_iso
  (make_nat_trans (constant_functor C C x)
     (constant_functor C C y) (λ _ : C, i)
     (λ (x0 x' : C) (_ : C ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),
      id_left i @ ! id_right i))
 intro ; apply z_iso_is_z_isomorphism.
  Defined.

  Context {C : category} (P : BinProducts C).
  Context {x y : C} (i : z_iso x y).

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
nat_z_iso (constprod_functor1 P x)
  (constprod_functor1 P y)

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
nat_z_iso (constprod_functor1 P x)
  (constprod_functor1 P y)

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
nat_z_iso (constant_functor C C x)
  (constant_functor C C y)
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (functor_identity C)

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
nat_z_iso (constant_functor C C x)
  (constant_functor C C y)
 
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
z_iso x y

      exact i.
    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
nat_z_iso (functor_identity C) (functor_identity C)
 apply nat_z_iso_id.
  Defined.

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
is_exponentiable P x → is_exponentiable P y

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
is_exponentiable P x → is_exponentiable P y

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
ex: is_exponentiable P x
is_exponentiable P y

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
ex: is_exponentiable P x
z_iso (constprod_functor1 P x)
  (constprod_functor1 P y)

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
ex: is_exponentiable P x
nat_z_iso (constprod_functor1 P x)
  (constprod_functor1 P y)

    exact constprod_functor1_mod_iso.
  Defined.

End IsExponentiableClosedUnderIso.

(** * 7. Exponents *)
Section Exponents.

  Context {C : category} (P : BinProducts C).

  Definition is_exponent_uvp
    {x y e : C} (ev : C⟦P x e, y⟧) : UU
    := is_coreflection (make_coreflection_data (F := constprod_functor1 P x) e ev).

  (* Evaluation map + universal property *)
  Definition is_Exponent
    (x y e : C) : UU
    := ∑ (ev : C⟦P x e, y⟧), is_exponent_uvp ev.

  (* The existence of the exponential [x,y] *)
  Definition Exponent (x y : C) : UU
    := coreflection y (constprod_functor1 P x).

  Identity Coercion exponent_to_coreflection : Exponent >-> coreflection.

  (* The existence of exponentials [x, -] *)
  Definition is_exponentiable_alt (x : C) : UU
    := ∏ (y : C), Exponent x y.

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x: C
is_exponentiable_alt x → is_exponentiable P x

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x: C
is_exponentiable_alt x → is_exponentiable P x

    apply coreflections_to_is_left_adjoint.
  Defined.

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x: C
e: is_exponentiable P x
∏ y : C, is_exponent_uvp (exp_eval e y)

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x: C
e: is_exponentiable P x
∏ y : C, is_exponent_uvp (exp_eval e y)

    exact (λ y, coreflection_is_coreflection (right_adjoint_weq_coreflections _ e y)).
  Defined.

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x: C
is_exponentiable P x → is_exponentiable_alt x

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x: C
is_exponentiable P x → is_exponentiable_alt x

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x: C
e: is_exponentiable P x
y: C
Exponent x y

    apply (right_adjoint_to_coreflection e).
  Defined.

End Exponents.

(** * 8. Properties of Exponents *)
Section ExponentsProperties.

  Context {C : category} (P : BinProducts C).

  Definition exponentials_unique_up_to_iso
    {x y : C} {e e' : C}
    {ev : C⟦P x e, y⟧} {ev' : C⟦P x e', y⟧}
    (ev_uvp : is_exponent_uvp P ev)
    (ev'_uvp : is_exponent_uvp P ev')
    : z_iso e e'
    := coreflection_uniqueness_iso (make_coreflection _ ev_uvp) (make_coreflection _ ev'_uvp).

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y: C
is_univalent C → isaprop (Exponent P x y)

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y: C
is_univalent C → isaprop (Exponent P x y)

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y: C
C_univ: is_univalent C
isaprop (Exponent P x y)

    exact (isaprop_coreflection C_univ).
  Qed.

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, x', y, y': C
i: z_iso x x'
j: z_iso y y'
e: Exponent P x y
Exponent P x' y'

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, x', y, y': C
i: z_iso x x'
j: z_iso y y'
e: Exponent P x y
Exponent P x' y'

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, x', y, y': C
i: z_iso x x'
j: z_iso y y'
e: Exponent P x y
nat_z_iso (constprod_functor1 P x)
  (constprod_functor1 P x')

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, x', y, y': C
i: z_iso x x'
j: z_iso y y'
e: Exponent P x y
z_iso x x'

    exact i.
  Defined.

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y, e': C
e: Exponent P x y
i: z_iso e' (coreflection_data_object e)
is_Exponent P x y e'

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y, e': C
e: Exponent P x y
i: z_iso e' (coreflection_data_object e)
is_Exponent P x y e'

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y, e': C
e: Exponent P x y
i: z_iso e' (coreflection_data_object e)
C ⟦ P x e', y ⟧
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y, e': C
e: Exponent P x y
i: z_iso e' (coreflection_data_object e)
(λ ev : C ⟦ P x e', y ⟧, is_exponent_uvp P ev) ?pr1

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y, e': C
e: Exponent P x y
i: z_iso e' (coreflection_data_object e)
C ⟦ P x e', y ⟧
 
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y, e': C
e: Exponent P x y
i: z_iso e' (coreflection_data_object e)
C ⟦ P x e',
constprod_functor1 P x (coreflection_data_object e) ⟧

      
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y, e': C
e: Exponent P x y
i: z_iso e' (coreflection_data_object e)
z_iso x
  (constant_functor C C x (coreflection_data_object e))
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y, e': C
e: Exponent P x y
i: z_iso e' (coreflection_data_object e)
z_iso e'
  (functor_identity C (coreflection_data_object e))

      
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y, e': C
e: Exponent P x y
i: z_iso e' (coreflection_data_object e)
z_iso x
  (constant_functor C C x (coreflection_data_object e))
 apply identity_z_iso.
      
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y, e': C
e: Exponent P x y
i: z_iso e' (coreflection_data_object e)
z_iso e'
  (functor_identity C (coreflection_data_object e))
 exact i.
    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y, e': C
e: Exponent P x y
i: z_iso e' (coreflection_data_object e)
(λ ev : C ⟦ P x e', y ⟧, is_exponent_uvp P ev)
  ((let X :=
      λ (Pab : BinProduct C x e')
      (Pcd : BinProduct C
               (constant_functor C C x
                  (coreflection_data_object e))
               (functor_identity C
                  (coreflection_data_object e)))
      (f : z_iso x
             (constant_functor C C x
                (coreflection_data_object e)))
      (g : z_iso e'
             (functor_identity C
                (coreflection_data_object e))),
      pr1 (binproduct_of_z_iso Pab Pcd f g) in
    X (P x e')
      (P
         (constant_functor C C x
            (coreflection_data_object e))
         (functor_identity C
            (coreflection_data_object e)))
      (identity_z_iso
         (constant_functor C C x
            (coreflection_data_object e))) i) · e)
 exact (is_coreflection_along_iso e i).
  Defined.

End ExponentsProperties.

(** * 9. PreservationCharacterizations *)
Section PreservationCharacterizations.

  Context {C₀ C₁ : category} (P₀ : BinProducts C₀) (P₁ : BinProducts C₁)
    {F : functor C₀ C₁} (F_pP : preserves_binproduct F).

  Definition preserves_exponential_objects : UU
    := ∏ (x y e : C₀) (ev : C₀⟦P₀ x e, y⟧),
      is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
      → is_exponent_uvp P₁
          (z_iso_inv (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso _ F_pP (P₀ _ _) (P₁ _ _)) · #F ev).

  
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects
∏ x y : C₀, Exponent P₀ x y → Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y)

  
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects
∏ x y : C₀, Exponent P₀ x y → Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y)

    
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects
x, y: C₀
e: Exponent P₀ x y
Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y)

    
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects
x, y: C₀
e: Exponent P₀ x y
t:= F_pE x y (coreflection_data_object e) e
  (coreflection_is_coreflection e): is_exponent_uvp P₁
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
        (P₀ x (coreflection_data_object e))
        (P₁ (F x) (F (coreflection_data_object e))))
   · # F e)
Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y)

    exact (make_coreflection _ t).
  Defined.

  Definition preserves_exponential_objects' (E₀ : Exponentials P₀) : UU
    := ∏ (x y : C₀), is_exponent_uvp P₁
                       (z_iso_inv (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso _ F_pP (P₀ _ _) (P₁ _ _))
                          · #F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y)).

  
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
∏ x y : C₀, Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y)

  
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
∏ x y : C₀, Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y)

    
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y: C₀
Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y)

    
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y: C₀
t:= F_pE x y: is_exponent_uvp P₁
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
        (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
        (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
   · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))
Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y)

    exact (make_coreflection _ t).
  Defined.

  
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects
x₀, y₀: C₀
z_iso (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)) (exp (E₁ (F x₀)) (F y₀))

  
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects
x₀, y₀: C₀
z_iso (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)) (exp (E₁ (F x₀)) (F y₀))

    
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects
x₀, y₀: C₀
is_exponent_uvp P₁ ?Goal1
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects
x₀, y₀: C₀
is_exponent_uvp P₁ ?Goal2

    
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects
x₀, y₀: C₀
is_exponent_uvp P₁ ?Goal1
 
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects
x₀, y₀: C₀
is_exponent_uvp P₀ ?ev

      exact (coreflection_is_coreflection (is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable_alt P₀ x₀ (E₀ x₀) y₀)).
    
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects
x₀, y₀: C₀
is_exponent_uvp P₁ ?Goal
 exact (coreflection_is_coreflection (is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable_alt P₁ (F x₀) (E₁ (F x₀)) (F y₀))).
  Defined.

  
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x₀, y₀: C₀
z_iso (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)) (exp (E₁ (F x₀)) (F y₀))

  
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x₀, y₀: C₀
z_iso (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)) (exp (E₁ (F x₀)) (F y₀))

    
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x₀, y₀: C₀
is_exponent_uvp P₁ ?Goal1
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x₀, y₀: C₀
is_exponent_uvp P₁ ?Goal2

    
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x₀, y₀: C₀
is_exponent_uvp P₁ ?Goal1
 apply F_pE.
    
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x₀, y₀: C₀
is_exponent_uvp P₁ ?Goal
 exact (coreflection_is_coreflection (is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable_alt P₁ (F x₀) (E₁ (F x₀)) (F y₀))).
  Defined.

  
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
→ preserves_exponentials E₀ E₁ F_pP

  
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
→ preserves_exponentials E₀ E₁ F_pP

    
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x₀, y₀: C₀
is_z_isomorphism
  (preserves_exponentials_map E₀ E₁ F_pP x₀ y₀)

    exact (is_z_isomorphism_path (idpath _)
             (pr2 (preserves_exponential_objects_to_iso' E₀ E₁ F_pE x₀ y₀))).
  Defined.

  
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponentials E₀ E₁ F_pP
∏ x y : C₀,
is_Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))

  
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponentials E₀ E₁ F_pP
∏ x y : C₀,
is_Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))

    
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponentials E₀ E₁ F_pP
x, y: C₀
is_Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))

    
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponentials E₀ E₁ F_pP
x, y: C₀
i:= make_z_iso'
  (preserves_exponentials_map E₀ E₁ F_pP x y)
  (F_pE x y): z_iso (F (exp (E₀ x) y)) (exp (E₁ (F x)) (F y))
is_Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))

    apply (is_Exponent_along_iso P₁ (right_adjoint_to_coreflection (E₁ _) _) i).
  Defined.

E₁: Exponentials P₁
preserves_exponentials E₀ E₁ F_pP
→ preserves_exponential_objects' E₀

P₁: BinProducts C₁

E₁: Exponentials P₁
preserves_exponentials E₀ E₁ F_pP
→ preserves_exponential_objects' E₀

    
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponentials E₀ E₁ F_pP
x, y: C₀
f₁: coreflection_data (F y)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x))
∃! g : C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f₁,
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
            (z_iso_inv
               (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
                  (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
                  (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
             · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) ⟧,
f₁ =
# (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) g
· make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
          (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
          (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
     · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))

    
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponentials E₀ E₁ F_pP
x, y: C₀
f₁: coreflection_data (F y)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x))
(∑
 g : C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f₁,
     coreflection_data_object
       (make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
          (z_iso_inv
             (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
                (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
                (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
           · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) ⟧,
 f₁ =
 # (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) g
 · make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
           (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
           (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
      · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y)))
≃ (∑
   g : C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f₁,
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
            (pr1
               (preserves_exponentials_to_exponent
                  F_pE x y))) ⟧,
   (f₁
    :
    C₁
    ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)
        (coreflection_data_object f₁), F y ⟧) =
   # (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) g
   · make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
       (pr1
          (preserves_exponentials_to_exponent F_pE x y)))

    
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponentials E₀ E₁ F_pP
x, y: C₀
f₁: coreflection_data (F y)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x))
∏
x0 : C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f₁,
     coreflection_data_object
       (make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
          (z_iso_inv
             (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
                (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
                (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
           · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) ⟧,
(λ x1 : C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f₁,
        coreflection_data_object
          (make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
             (z_iso_inv
                (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
                   (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
                   (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
              · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) ⟧,
 f₁ =
 # (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) x1
 · make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
           (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
           (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
      · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) x0
≃ (λ x1 : C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f₁,
          coreflection_data_object
            (make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
               (z_iso_inv
                  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
                     F_pP (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
                     (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
                · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) ⟧,
   (f₁
    :
    C₁
    ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)
        (coreflection_data_object f₁), F y ⟧) =
   # (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) x1
   · make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
       (pr1
          (preserves_exponentials_to_exponent F_pE x y)))
    x0

coreflection_data_object
  (make_coreflection_data 
     (F (exp (E₀ x) y))

             (z_iso_inv

                   (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
                   (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
              · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) ⟧,
 f₁ =
 # (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) x0
 · make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
           (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
           (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
      · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) x0
≃ (λ x0 : C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f₁,
          coreflection_data_object
            (make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
               (z_iso_inv
                  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
                     F_pP (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
                     (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
                · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) ⟧,
   (f₁
    :
    C₁
    ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)
        (coreflection_data_object f₁), F y ⟧) =
   # (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) x0
   · make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
       (pr1
          (preserves_exponentials_to_exponent F_pE x y)))
    x0

    
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁

E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁

x, y: C₀
f₁: coreflection_data (F y)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x))
x0: C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f₁,
coreflection_data_object
  (make_coreflection_data 
     (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
           (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
           (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
      · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) ⟧
f₁ =
# (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) x0
· make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
          (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
          (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
     · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))
→ (f₁
   :
   C₁
   ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)
       (coreflection_data_object f₁), F y ⟧) =
  # (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) x0
  · make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
      (pr1
         (preserves_exponentials_to_exponent F_pE x y))

P₁: BinProducts C₁

  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x))
x0: C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f₁,
coreflection_data_object
  (make_coreflection_data 
     (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
           (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
           (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
      · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) ⟧
(f₁
 :
 C₁
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₁ 
     (F x) (coreflection_data_object f₁), 
 F y ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) x0
· make_coreflection_data 
    (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
    (pr1 (preserves_exponentials_to_exponent F_pE x y))
→ f₁ =
  # (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) x0
  · make_coreflection_data 
      (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
      (z_iso_inv
         (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
            (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))

  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x))
x0: C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f₁,
coreflection_data_object
  (make_coreflection_data 
     (F (exp (E₀ x) y))

      · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) ⟧
isaprop
  (f₁ =
   # (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) x0
   · make_coreflection_data 
       (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
       (z_iso_inv

             (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))

pf: f₁ =

C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponentials E₀ E₁ F_pP
x, y: C₀
f₁: coreflection_data (F y)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x))
x0: C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f₁,
coreflection_data_object
  (make_coreflection_data 
     (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
           (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
           (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
      · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) ⟧
pf: f₁ =
# (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) x0
· make_coreflection_data 
    (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
          (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
          (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
     · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))
# (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) x0
· make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
          (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
          (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
     · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y)) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) x0
· make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
    (pr1 (preserves_exponentials_to_exponent F_pE x y))

      
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponentials E₀ E₁ F_pP
x, y: C₀
f₁: coreflection_data (F y)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x))
x0: C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f₁,
coreflection_data_object
  (make_coreflection_data 
     (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
           (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
           (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
      · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) ⟧
pf: f₁ =
# (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) x0
· make_coreflection_data 
    (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
          (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
          (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
     · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))
make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
        (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
        (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
   · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y)) =
make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
  (pr1 (preserves_exponentials_to_exponent F_pE x y))

      apply pathsinv0, exp_beta.
    
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁

f₁: coreflection_data (F y)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x))
x0: C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f₁,
coreflection_data_object
  (make_coreflection_data 
     (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
           (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
           (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
      · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) ⟧
(f₁
 :
 C₁
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)
     (coreflection_data_object f₁), F y ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) x0
· make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
    (pr1 (preserves_exponentials_to_exponent F_pE x y))
→ f₁ =
  # (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) x0
  · make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
      (z_iso_inv
         (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
            (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
            (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
       · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))

     (z_iso_inv

 :

 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₁ 
     (F x) (coreflection_data_object f₁), 
 F y ⟧) =

C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponentials E₀ E₁ F_pP
x, y: C₀
f₁: coreflection_data (F y)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x))
x0: C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f₁,
coreflection_data_object
  (make_coreflection_data 
     (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
           (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
           (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
      · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) ⟧
pf: (f₁
 :
 C₁
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₁ 
     (F x) (coreflection_data_object f₁), 
 F y ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) x0
· make_coreflection_data 
    (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
    (pr1
       (preserves_exponentials_to_exponent F_pE x
          y))
make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
  (pr1 (preserves_exponentials_to_exponent F_pE x y)) =
make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
        (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
        (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
   · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))

C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponentials E₀ E₁ F_pP
x, y: C₀
f₁: coreflection_data (F y)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x))
x0: C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f₁,
coreflection_data_object
  (make_coreflection_data 
     (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
           (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
           (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
      · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) ⟧
isaprop
  (f₁ =
   # (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) x0
   · make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
       (z_iso_inv
          (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
             (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
             (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
        · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y)))
 apply homset_property.
    
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
E₁: Exponentials P₁
F_pE: preserves_exponentials E₀ E₁ F_pP
x, y: C₀
f₁: coreflection_data (F y)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x))
x0: C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f₁,
coreflection_data_object
  (make_coreflection_data 
     (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
           (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
           (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
      · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) ⟧
isaprop
  ((f₁
    :
    C₁
    ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)
        (coreflection_data_object f₁), F y ⟧) =
   # (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) x0
   · make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
       (pr1
          (preserves_exponentials_to_exponent F_pE x y)))
 apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
preserves_exponential_objects

  
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
preserves_exponential_objects

    
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
is_exponent_uvp P₁
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP (P₀ x e)
        (P₁ (F x) (F e))) · # F ev)


    
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
C₁ ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x) (F e), F y ⟧
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
?f₁ =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP 
     (P₀ x e) (P₁ (F x) (F e))) · 
# F ev

x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
is_coreflection (make_coreflection_data (F e) ?f₁)

P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁

E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
C₀ ⟦ P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y), y ⟧
 apply exp_eval.
      
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
is_exponent_uvp P₀ (exp_eval (E₀ x) y)
 apply is_exponentiable_to_uvp.
    
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y)))
  (P₁ (constant_functor C₁ C₁ (F x) (F e))
     (functor_identity C₁ (F e))) (identity (F x))
  (# F
     (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀ ev_uvp
        (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ (E₀ x) y)))
· z_iso_inv
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
       (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
       (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
· # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y) =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP (P₀ x e)
     (P₁ (F x) (F e))) · # F ev
 
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y)))
  (P₁ (constant_functor C₁ C₁ (F x) (F e))
     (functor_identity C₁ (F e))) (# F (identity x))
  (# F
     (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀ ev_uvp
        (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ (E₀ x) y)))
· z_iso_inv
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
       (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
       (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
· # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y) =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP (P₀ x e)
     (P₁ (F x) (F e))) · # F ev

      
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y)))
  (P₁ (constant_functor C₁ C₁ (F x) (F e))
     (functor_identity C₁ (F e))) (# F (identity x))
  (# F
     (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀ ev_uvp
        (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ (E₀ x) y)))
· z_iso_inv
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
       (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
       (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
· # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y) = ?b
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
?b =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP 
     (P₀ x e) (P₁ (F x) (F e))) · 
# F ev
 
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y)))
  (P₁ (constant_functor C₁ C₁ (F x) (F e))
     (functor_identity C₁ (F e))) (# F (identity x))
  (# F
     (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀ ev_uvp
        (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ (E₀ x) y)))
· z_iso_inv
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
       (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
       (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
· # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y) = ?b

        
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y)))
  (P₁ (constant_functor C₁ C₁ (F x) (F e))
     (functor_identity C₁ (F e))) (# F (identity x))
  (# F
     (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀ ev_uvp
        (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ (E₀ x) y)))
· z_iso_inv
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
       (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
       (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y)))) = ?y'

        
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
?y' =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y)))
  (P₁ (constant_functor C₁ C₁ (F x) (F e))
     (functor_identity C₁ (F e))) (# F (identity x))
  (# F
     (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀ ev_uvp
        (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ (E₀ x) y)))
· z_iso_inv
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
       (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
       (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))

        apply (preserves_binproduct_of_arrows F_pP (identity x) (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀ ev_uvp (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ (E₀ x) y))).
      
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP (P₀ x e)
     (P₁ (F x) (F e)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
       (P₀ x e) (identity x)
       (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀ ev_uvp
          (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ (E₀ x) y)))
· # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y) =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP (P₀ x e)
     (P₁ (F x) (F e))) · # F ev

      
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP (P₀ x e)
     (P₁ (F x) (F e)))
· (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
        (P₀ x e) (identity x)
        (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀ ev_uvp
           (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ (E₀ x) y)))
   · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y)) =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP (P₀ x e)
     (P₁ (F x) (F e))) · # F ev

      
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP (P₀ x e)
     (P₁ (F x) (F e)))
· (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
        (P₀ x e) (identity x)
        (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀ ev_uvp
           (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ (E₀ x) y)))
   · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y)) = ?b
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
?b =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP 
     (P₀ x e) (P₁ (F x) (F e))) · 
# F ev
 
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP (P₀ x e)
     (P₁ (F x) (F e)))
· (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
        (P₀ x e) (identity x)
        (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀ ev_uvp
           (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ (E₀ x) y)))
   · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y)) = ?b
 apply maponpaths, pathsinv0, functor_comp. 
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP (P₀ x e)
     (P₁ (F x) (F e)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
       (P₀ x e) (identity x)
       (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀ ev_uvp
          (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ (E₀ x) y))
     · exp_eval (E₀ x) y) =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP (P₀ x e)
     (P₁ (F x) (F e))) · # F ev

      
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y)) (P₀ x e)
  (identity x)
  (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀ ev_uvp
     (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ (E₀ x) y))
· exp_eval (E₀ x) y = ev

      apply exp_beta.
    
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
is_coreflection
  (make_coreflection_data (F e)
     (BinProductOfArrows C₁
        (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y)))
        (P₁ (constant_functor C₁ C₁ (F x) (F e))
           (functor_identity C₁ (F e)))
        (identity (F x))
        (# F
           (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀ ev_uvp
              (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ (E₀ x) y)))
      · z_iso_inv
          (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
             (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
             (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
      · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y)))
 
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
f: coreflection_data (F y)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x))
∃! g : C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data (F e)
            (BinProductOfArrows C₁
               (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y)))
               (P₁
                  (constant_functor C₁ C₁ (F x) (F e))
                  (functor_identity C₁ (F e)))
               (identity (F x))
               (# F
                  (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀
                     ev_uvp
                     (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀
                        (E₀ x) y)))
             · z_iso_inv
                 (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
                    (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
                    (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
             · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) g
· make_coreflection_data (F e)
    (BinProductOfArrows C₁
       (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y)))
       (P₁ (constant_functor C₁ C₁ (F x) (F e))
          (functor_identity C₁ (F e)))
       (identity (F x))
       (# F
          (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀ ev_uvp
             (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ (E₀ x) y)))
     · z_iso_inv
         (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
            (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
            (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
     · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))

      
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
f: coreflection_data (F y)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x))
ee:= z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
     (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
     (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
· # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y),, 
F_pE x y
:
is_Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y) (F (exp (E₀ x) y)): is_Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
∃! g : C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data (F e)
            (BinProductOfArrows C₁
               (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y)))
               (P₁
                  (constant_functor C₁ C₁ (F x) (F e))
                  (functor_identity C₁ (F e)))
               (identity (F x))
               (# F
                  (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀
                     ev_uvp
                     (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀
                        (E₀ x) y)))
             · z_iso_inv
                 (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
                    (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
                    (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
             · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) g
· make_coreflection_data (F e)
    (BinProductOfArrows C₁
       (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y)))
       (P₁ (constant_functor C₁ C₁ (F x) (F e))
          (functor_identity C₁ (F e)))
       (identity (F x))
       (# F
          (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀ ev_uvp
             (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ (E₀ x) y)))
     · z_iso_inv
         (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
            (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
            (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
     · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))

      
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
f: coreflection_data (F y)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x))
ee:= z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
     (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
     (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
· # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y),, 
F_pE x y
:
is_Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y) (F (exp (E₀ x) y)): is_Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
ee':= make_coreflection
  (make_coreflection_data 
     (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
           (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
           (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
      · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) 
  (F_pE x y)
:
Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y): Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y)
∃! g : C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data (F e)
            (BinProductOfArrows C₁
               (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y)))
               (P₁
                  (constant_functor C₁ C₁ (F x) (F e))
                  (functor_identity C₁ (F e)))
               (identity (F x))
               (# F
                  (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀
                     ev_uvp
                     (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀
                        (E₀ x) y)))
             · z_iso_inv
                 (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
                    (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
                    (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
             · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) g
· make_coreflection_data (F e)
    (BinProductOfArrows C₁
       (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y)))
       (P₁ (constant_functor C₁ C₁ (F x) (F e))
          (functor_identity C₁ (F e)))
       (identity (F x))
       (# F
          (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀ ev_uvp
             (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ (E₀ x) y)))
     · z_iso_inv
         (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
            (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
            (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
     · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))


      
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
f: coreflection_data (F y)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x))
ee:= z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
     (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
     (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
· # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y),, 
F_pE x y
:
is_Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y) (F (exp (E₀ x) y)): is_Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
ee':= make_coreflection
  (make_coreflection_data 
     (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
           (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
           (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
      · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) 
  (F_pE x y)
:
Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y): Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y)
s:= is_Exponent_along_iso P₁ ee'
  (functor_on_z_iso F
     (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀ ev_uvp
        (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ (E₀ x) y))): is_Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y) (F e)
∃! g : C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data (F e)
            (BinProductOfArrows C₁
               (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y)))
               (P₁
                  (constant_functor C₁ C₁ (F x) (F e))
                  (functor_identity C₁ (F e)))
               (identity (F x))
               (# F
                  (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀
                     ev_uvp
                     (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀
                        (E₀ x) y)))
             · z_iso_inv
                 (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
                    (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
                    (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
             · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) g
· make_coreflection_data (F e)
    (BinProductOfArrows C₁
       (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y)))
       (P₁ (constant_functor C₁ C₁ (F x) (F e))
          (functor_identity C₁ (F e)))
       (identity (F x))
       (# F
          (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀ ev_uvp
             (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ (E₀ x) y)))
     · z_iso_inv
         (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
            (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
            (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
     · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))

      
C₀, C₁: category
P₀: BinProducts C₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
E₀: Exponentials P₀
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' E₀
x, y, e: C₀
ev: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x e, y ⟧
ev_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev
f: coreflection_data (F y)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x))
ee:= z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
     (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
     (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
· # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y),, 
F_pE x y
:
is_Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y) (F (exp (E₀ x) y)): is_Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
ee':= make_coreflection
  (make_coreflection_data 
     (F (exp (E₀ x) y))
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
           (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
           (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
      · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y))) 
  (F_pE x y)
:
Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y): Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y)
s:= is_Exponent_along_iso P₁ ee'
  (functor_on_z_iso F
     (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀ ev_uvp
        (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ (E₀ x) y))): is_Exponent P₁ (F x) (F y) (F e)
∃! g : C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data (F e)
            (BinProductOfArrows C₁
               (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y)))
               (P₁
                  (constant_functor C₁ C₁ (F x) (F e))
                  (functor_identity C₁ (F e)))
               (identity (F x))
               (# F
                  (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀
                     ev_uvp
                     (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀
                        (E₀ x) y)))
             · (z_iso_inv
                  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
                     F_pP (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
                     (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
                · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y)))) ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x)) g
· make_coreflection_data (F e)
    (BinProductOfArrows C₁
       (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y)))
       (P₁ (constant_functor C₁ C₁ (F x) (F e))
          (functor_identity C₁ (F e)))
       (identity (F x))
       (# F
          (exponentials_unique_up_to_iso P₀ ev_uvp
             (is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ (E₀ x) y)))
     · (z_iso_inv
          (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
             (P₀ x (exp (E₀ x) y))
             (P₁ (F x) (F (exp (E₀ x) y))))
        · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x) y)))

      exact (pr2 s f).
  Qed.

End PreservationCharacterizations.

(** * 10. Reflection *)
Section Reflection.

  Context {C₀ C₁ : category} (P₀ : BinProducts C₀) (P₁ : BinProducts C₁)
    {F : functor C₀ C₁} (F_pP : preserves_binproduct F).

  Definition reflects_exponential_objects : UU
    := ∏ (x y e : C₀) (ev : C₀⟦P₀ x e, y⟧),
      is_exponent_uvp P₁
        (z_iso_inv (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso _ F_pP (P₀ _ _) (P₁ _ _)) · #F ev)
      → is_exponent_uvp P₀ ev.

End Reflection.
